choices.romaji: Futsuu ni seikatsu sureba ii desu yo. Ki ni shinai de.
choices.arti: Just live life as usual. Don't think about it.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng là 'Please follow dietary restrictions and avoid intense exercise' vì cung cấp concrete medical advice using keigo cao. Trong khi đó, 'Just live life as usual' is thiếu trách nhiệm as it bỏ qua important medical instructions.

conversation.speaker: Bac si

question.jepang: セカンドオピニオンをお求(もと)めになることも可能(かのう)ですので、ご遠慮(えんりょ)なくお申(もう)し付(つ)けください。
question.romaji: Sekando opinion wo o-motome ni naru koto mo kanou desu node, go-enryo naku o-moushi tsuke kudasai.
question.arti: Seeking a second opinion is also possible, so please don't hesitate to speak up.

choices.jepang: ありがとうございます。先生(せんせい)の診断(しんだん)を信頼(しんらい)しておりますが、手術(しゅじゅつ)という大(おお)きな決断(けつだん)であるからこそ、念(ねん)のためセカンドオピニオンもいただきたいと思(おも)います。
choices.romaji: Arigatou gozaimasu. Sensei no shindan wo shinrai shite orimasu ga, shujutsu to iu ooki na ketsudan de aru kara koso, nen no tame sekando opinion mo itadakitai to omoimasu.
choices.arti: Thank you. I trust the doctor's diagnosis, but precisely because this is a big decision about surgery, I'd like to get a second opinion just to be safe.

choices.jepang: 先生(せんせい)の診断(しんだん)が間違(まちが)っているかもしれないので、別(べつ)の病院(びょういん)に行(い)きます。
choices.romaji: Sensei no shindan ga machigatte iru kamo shirenai node, betsu no byouin ni ikimasu.
choices.arti: The doctor's diagnosis might be wrong, so I'll go to another hospital.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng là 'Precisely because this is a big decision about surgery, I'd like to get a second opinion just to be safe' vì sử dụng ~からこそ để giải thích the reason politely mà không doubting the doctor. Trong khi đó, 'The doctor's diagnosis might be wrong' is very thiếu lịch sự and damages the doctor-patient relationship.

conversation.speaker: Benh nhan

question.jepang: 治療費(ちりょうひ)について心配(しんぱい)しています。高額(こうがく)療養費(りょうようひ)制度(せいど)は利用(りよう)できますか。
question.romaji: Chiryouhi ni tsuite shinpai shite imasu. Kougaku ryouyouhi seido wa riyou dekimasu ka.
question.arti: I'm worried about the treatment costs. Can the high-cost medical expense limit system be used?

choices.jepang: お金(かね)のことは自分(じぶん)で調(しら)べてください。
choices.romaji: O-kane no koto wa jibun de shirabete kudasai.
choices.arti: Please look into costs yourself.

choices.jepang: はい、ご利用(りよう)いただけます。所得(しょとく)に応(おう)じた自己(じこ)負担(ふたん)限度額(げんどがく)がございますので、医事課(いじか)にてお手続(てつづ)きいただけます。
choices.romaji: Hai, go-riyou itadakemasu. Shotoku ni oujita jiko futan gendogaku ga gozaimasu node, ijika nite o-tetsuzuki itadakemasu.
choices.arti: Yes, it can be used. There's a maximum personal burden limit based on income, so you can process it at the medical administration department.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng là 'Yes, it can be used. There's a maximum personal burden limit based on income' vì cung cấp concrete information and directs the patient to the right department. Trong khi đó, 'Please look into costs yourself' is không chuyên nghiệp and unhelpful to a worried patient.

conversation.speaker: Bac si

question.jepang: 次回(じかい)の診察(しんさつ)の日程(にってい)が決(き)まり次第(しだい)、お電話(でんわ)にてご連絡(れんらく)いたします。
question.romaji: Jikai no shinsetsu no nittei ga kimari shidai, o-denwa nite go-renraku itashimasu.
question.arti: Once the next appointment schedule is determined, we will contact you by phone.

choices.jepang: ありがとうございます。もし緊急(きんきゅう)の症状(しょうじょう)が現(あらわ)れた際(さい)は、すぐにご連絡(れんらく)させていただいてもよろしいでしょうか。
choices.romaji: Arigatou gozaimasu. Moshi kinkyuu no shoujou ga arawareta sai wa, sugu ni go-renraku sasete itadaite mo yoroshii deshou ka.
choices.arti: Thank you. If emergency symptoms appear, may I contact you immediately?

choices.jepang: 自分(じぶん)で電話(でんわ)します。大丈夫(だいじょうぶ)です。
choices.romaji: Jibun de denwa shimasu. Daijoubu desu.
choices.arti: I'll call myself. It's fine.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng là 'If emergency symptoms appear, may I contact you immediately?' vì proactively asks about emergency procedures using keigo cao. Trong khi đó, 'I'll call myself' refuses the doctor's help mà không a clear reason.

title: Chuẩn bị phòng chống thiên tai

conversation.speaker: Nhan vien ung pho tham hoa

question.jepang: 近年(きんねん)、自然(しぜん)災害(さいがい)の発生(はっせい)頻度(ひんど)が高(たか)まりつつあります。防災(ぼうさい)対策(たいさく)についてのご認識(にんしき)はございますか。
question.romaji: Kinnen, shizen saigai no hassei hindo ga takamari tsutsu arimasu. Bousai taisaku ni tsuite no go-ninshiki wa gozaimasu ka.
question.arti: Recently, the frequency of natural disasters continues to increase. Do you have an understanding of disaster preparedness?

choices.jepang: はい、非常(ひじょう)用(よう)持(も)ち出(だ)し袋(ぶくろ)の準備(じゅんび)や、避難(ひなん)場所(ばしょ)の確認(かくにん)など、基本(きほん)的(てき)な対策(たいさく)は行(おこな)っております。
choices.romaji: Hai, hijou-you mochidashi bukuro no junbi ya, hinan basho no kakunin nado, kihon-teki na taisaku wa okonatte orimasu.
choices.arti: Yes, I have taken basic steps such as preparing an emergency bag and checking evacuation locations.

choices.jepang: 災害(さいがい)なんて、来(く)るときは来(く)るんだからしょうがない。
choices.romaji: Saigai nante, kuru toki wa kuru n dakara shouganai.
choices.arti: If a disaster is going to come, it just comes. There's nothing you can do about it.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cho thấy awareness and concrete action. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai cho thấy a nguy hiểmly passive attitude.

conversation.speaker: Warga

question.jepang: 地震(じしん)発生(はっせい)に伴(ともな)い、津波(つなみ)の危険性(きけんせい)も考慮(こうりょ)しなければならないのでしょうか。
question.romaji: Jishin hassei ni tomonai, tsunami no kikensei mo kouryo shinakereba naranai no deshou ka.
question.arti: Along with the occurrence of an earthquake, should we also consider the danger of a tsunami?

choices.jepang: 地震(じしん)と津波(つなみ)は関係(かんけい)ないので、別々(べつべつ)に考(かんが)えてください。
choices.romaji: Jishin to tsunami wa kankei nai node, betsubetsu ni kangaete kudasai.
choices.arti: Earthquakes and tsunamis are unrelated, so think about them separately.

choices.jepang: おっしゃる通(とお)りです。特(とく)に沿岸(えんがん)地域(ちいき)にお住(す)まいの方(かた)は、地震(じしん)発生(はっせい)後(ご)は直(ただ)ちに高台(たかだい)への避難(ひなん)を優先(ゆうせん)していただく必要(ひつよう)がございます。
choices.romaji: Ossharu toori desu. Toku ni engan chiiki ni o-sumai no kata wa, jishin hassei-go wa tadachi ni takadai e no hinan o yuusen shite itadaku hitsuyou ga gozaimasu.
choices.arti: Correct. Especially for those living in coastal areas, it's necessary to immediately prioritize evacuation to higher ground after an earthquake.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cung cấp accurate information about the earthquake-tsunami relationship. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is factually nguy hiểm.

conversation.speaker: Nhan vien ung pho tham hoa

question.jepang: 避難(ひなん)指示(しじ)が出(で)た場合(ばあい)、速(すみ)やかに避難(ひなん)せざるを得(え)ない状況(じょうきょう)になります。事前(じぜん)に避難(ひなん)ルートを確認(かくにん)しておくことが重要(じゅうよう)です。
question.romaji: Hinan shiji ga deta baai, sumiyaka ni hinan sezaru o enai joukyou ni narimasu. Jizen ni hinan ruuto o kakunin shite oku koto ga juuyou desu.
question.arti: If an evacuation order is issued, the situation requires immediate evacuation. It's important to check evacuation routes in advance.

choices.jepang: 避難(ひなん)ルートについて、ハザードマップを参考(さんこう)に確認(かくにん)しておくことが大切(たいせつ)ということですね。早速(さっそく)調(しら)べてみます。
choices.romaji: Hinan ruuto ni tsuite, hazaado mappu o sankou ni kakunin shite oku koto ga taisetsu to iu koto desu ne. Sassoku shirabete mimasu.
choices.arti: That means it's important to check evacuation routes by referring to the hazard map. I'll look it up right away.

choices.jepang: 避難(ひなん)するときに考(かんが)えればいいじゃないですか。今(いま)は必要(ひつよう)ないです。
choices.romaji: Hinan suru toki ni kangaereba ii ja nai desu ka. Ima wa hitsuyou nai desu.
choices.arti: I'll think about it when it's time to evacuate. Not necessary now.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cho thấy understanding and positive follow-through. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai cho thấy a nguy hiểm attitude.

conversation.speaker: Warga

question.jepang: 備蓄(びちく)品(ひん)の準備(じゅんび)について、最低限(さいていげん)必要(ひつよう)なものをお教(おし)えいただけますでしょうか。
question.romaji: Bichikuhin no junbi ni tsuite, saitei gen hitsuyou na mono o oshiete itadakemasu deshou ka.
question.arti: Regarding emergency supply preparation, could you teach me what's minimally needed?

choices.jepang: 飲料水(いんりょうすい)、非常(ひじょう)食(しょく)、救急(きゅうきゅう)用品(ようひん)、懐中(かいちゅう)電灯(でんとう)などが最低限(さいていげん)必要(ひつよう)な備蓄(びちく)品(ひん)でございます。3日分(みっかぶん)以上(いじょう)のご準備(じゅんび)をお勧(すす)めしております。
choices.romaji: Inryousui, hijou-shoku, kyuukyuu youhin, kaichuu dentou nado ga saitei gen hitsuyou na bichiku-hin de gozaimasu. Mikka-bun ijou no go-junbi o o-susume shite orimasu.
choices.arti: Drinking water, emergency food, first aid supplies, and a flashlight are the minimum supplies. We recommend at least 3 days' worth.

choices.jepang: スマートフォンさえあれば大丈夫(だいじょうぶ)です。何(なん)でも調(しら)べられますから。
choices.romaji: Sumaatofon sae areba daijoubu desu. Nandemo shiraberaremasu kara.
choices.arti: As long as you have a smartphone, that's enough. You can look up anything.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cung cấp practical information according to official guidelines. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is nguy hiểm because during disasters internet can be cut off.

conversation.speaker: Nhan vien ung pho tham hoa

question.jepang: 地域(ちいき)の防災(ぼうさい)訓練(くんれん)に参加(さんか)する一方(いっぽう)で、ご家族(かぞく)との連絡(れんらく)方法(ほうほう)も事前(じぜん)に決(き)めておくことが大切(たいせつ)です。
question.romaji: Chiiki no bousai kunren ni sanka suru ippou de, go-kazoku to no renraku houhou mo jizen ni kimete oku koto ga taisetsu desu.
question.arti: On one hand participating in community disaster drills, on the other hand it's also important to determine how to contact family.

choices.jepang: 訓練(くんれん)は面倒(めんどう)だから、家族(かぞく)との連絡(れんらく)だけ考(かんが)えます。
choices.romaji: Kunren wa mendou dakara, kazoku to no renraku dake kangaemasu.
choices.arti: Drills are troublesome. I'll only think about communicating with family.

choices.jepang: おっしゃる通(とお)りです。集合(しゅうごう)場所(ばしょ)と連絡(れんらく)手段(しゅだん)を家族(かぞく)と話(はな)し合(あ)っておくようにいたします。
choices.romaji: Ossharu toori desu. Shuugou basho to renraku shudan o kazoku to hanashi atte oku you ni itashimasu.
choices.arti: Correct. I will discuss meeting places and communication methods with my family.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng đáp lại positively and states commitment. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai bỏ qua tầm quan trọng của community disaster drills.

conversation.speaker: Warga

question.jepang: 災害(さいがい)時(じ)の情報(じょうほう)収集(しゅうしゅう)にはどのような手段(しゅだん)が有効(ゆうこう)でしょうか。SNSの情報(じょうほう)は信頼(しんらい)できますか。
question.romaji: Saigai-ji no jouhou shuushuu ni wa dono you na shudan ga yuukou deshou ka. SNS no jouhou wa shinrai dekimasu ka.
question.arti: For information gathering during a disaster, what methods are effective? Can information from social media be trusted?

choices.jepang: SNSだけで十分(じゅうぶん)です。みんなが情報(じょうほう)を共有(きょうゆう)してくれます。
choices.romaji: SNS dake de juubun desu. Minna ga jouhou wo kyouyuu shite kuremasu.
choices.arti: SNS alone is enough. Everyone will share information.

choices.jepang: SNSは便利(べんり)な一方(いっぽう)で、デマ情報(じょうほう)が拡散(かくさん)しかねないため、公式(こうしき)な防災(ぼうさい)アプリや自治体(じちたい)のウェブサイトを優先(ゆうせん)することをお勧(すす)めします。
choices.romaji: SNS wa benri na ippou de, dema jouhou ga kakusan shikanenai tame, koushiki na bousai apuri ya jichitai no webu saito wo yuusen suru koto wo osusume shimasu.
choices.arti: SNS is indeed convenient, but on the other hand false information could spread, so we recommend prioritizing official disaster apps and local government websites.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~一方で and ~かねない để giải thích SNS risks in a cân bằng way. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai bỏ qua rủi ro của misinformation during disasters.

conversation.speaker: Nhan vien ung pho tham hoa

question.jepang: ペットを飼(か)っている方(かた)は、ペットの避難(ひなん)についても事前(じぜん)に考(かんが)えておかなければなりません。
question.romaji: Petto wo katte iru kata wa, petto no hinan ni tsuite mo jizen ni kangaete okanakereba narimasen.
question.arti: For those who keep pets, you also need to think about pet evacuation in advance.

choices.jepang: ペットは家(いえ)に置(お)いていけばいいでしょう。動物(どうぶつ)は自分(じぶん)で生(い)き延(の)びます。
choices.romaji: Petto wa ie ni oite ikeba ii deshou. Doubutsu wa jibun de ikinobimasu.
choices.arti: Leave pets at home. Animals can survive on their own.

choices.jepang: おっしゃる通(とお)りです。ペット用(よう)の避難(ひなん)グッズの準備(じゅんび)や、受(う)け入(い)れ可能(かのう)な避難(ひなん)所(じょ)の確認(かくにん)など、飼(か)い主(ぬし)としての責任(せきにん)を果(は)たさないわけにはいきませんね。
choices.romaji: Ossharu toori desu. Petto you no hinan guzzu no junbi ya, ukeire kanou na hinanjo no kakunin nado, kainushi toshite no sekinin wo hatasanai wake ni wa ikimasen ne.
choices.arti: Correct. As a pet owner, one must fulfill their responsibility, such as preparing pet evacuation supplies and checking shelters that accept animals.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~わけにはいかない để nhấn mạnh pet owner responsibility. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai cho thấy an thiếu trách nhiệm attitude.

conversation.speaker: Warga

question.jepang: 避難(ひなん)所(じょ)での生活(せいかつ)が長期(ちょうき)化(か)した場合(ばあい)、高齢者(こうれいしゃ)への支援(しえん)はどのようになっておりますでしょうか。
question.romaji: Hinanjo de no seikatsu ga chouki-ka shita baai, koureisha e no shien wa dono you ni natte orimasu deshou ka.
question.arti: If evacuation shelter life becomes long-term, how is support for the elderly?

choices.jepang: 避難(ひなん)所(じょ)では、要配慮(ようはいりょ)者(しゃ)向(む)けの専用(せんよう)スペースを設(もう)けるとともに、ボランティアや行政(ぎょうせい)の支援(しえん)チームが連携(れんけい)して対応(たいおう)にあたる体制(たいせい)となっております。
choices.romaji: Hinanjo de wa, you-hairyo-sha muke no sen'you supeesu o moukeru to tomo ni, borantia ya gyousei no shien chiimu ga renkei shite taiou ni ataru taisei to natte orimasu.
choices.arti: At evacuation shelters, in addition to cung cấp special spaces for those with special needs, there is a system where volunteer teams and the government cooperate.

choices.jepang: お年寄(としよ)りは自分(じぶん)で何(なん)とかしてもらわないと困(こま)ります。
choices.romaji: O-toshiyori wa jibun de nantoka shite morawanai to komarimasu.
choices.arti: The elderly should take care of themselves, otherwise we'll be troubled.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cung cấp toàn diện information about support systems. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai cho thấy a lack of empathy.

conversation.speaker: Nhan vien ung pho tham hoa

question.jepang: 最後(さいご)に、防災(ぼうさい)意識(いしき)を高(たか)めるために、日頃(ひごろ)からできることをお伝(つた)えします。
question.romaji: Saigo ni, bousai ishiki wo takameru tame ni, higoro kara dekiru koto wo o-tsutae shimasu.
question.arti: Lastly, I will share things that can be done daily to increase disaster awareness.

choices.jepang: ぜひ教(おし)えてください。家族(かぞく)全員(ぜんいん)の防災(ぼうさい)意識(いしき)を高(たか)めていかざるを得(え)ない時代(じだい)ですからね。
choices.romaji: Zehi oshiete kudasai. Kazoku zen'in no bousai ishiki wo takamete ika zaruwoenai jidai desu kara ne.
choices.arti: Please tell us. We live in an era where we have no choice but to increase the whole family's disaster awareness.

choices.jepang: もう十分(じゅうぶん)聞(き)きました。帰(かえ)ります。
choices.romaji: Mou juubun kikimashita. Kaerimasu.
choices.arti: I've heard enough. I'm going home.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~ざるを得ない để thể hiện urgency. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai cho thấy an uncooperative attitude.

conversation.speaker: Warga

question.jepang: 今日(きょう)のお話(はなし)を踏(ふ)まえて、早速(さっそく)家族(かぞく)と防災(ぼうさい)会議(かいぎ)を開(ひら)きたいと思(おも)います。ありがとうございました。
question.romaji: Kyou no o-hanashi wo fumaete, sassoku kazoku to bousai kaigi wo hirakitai to omoimasu. Arigatou gozaimashita.
question.arti: Based on today's discussion, I want to hold a disaster meeting with my family soon. Thank you very much.

choices.jepang: 素晴(すば)らしいですね。ご家族(かぞく)との防災(ぼうさい)会議(かいぎ)は非常(ひじょう)に有効(ゆうこう)です。何(なに)かご不明(ふめい)な点(てん)がございましたら、いつでもご連絡(れんらく)ください。
choices.romaji: Subarashii desu ne. Go-kazoku to no bousai kaigi wa hijou ni yuukou desu. Nanika go-fumei na ten ga gozaimashitara, itsu demo go-renraku kudasai.
choices.arti: That's wonderful. A disaster meeting with family is very effective. If anything is unclear, please contact us anytime.

choices.jepang: はい、頑張(がんば)ってください。
choices.romaji: Hai, ganbatte kudasai.
choices.arti: Yes, good luck.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cung cấp a chuyên nghiệp closing with appreciation and an offer of help. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is quá ngắn gọn and uninformative.

title: Thảo luận về quyền lợi người lao động

conversation.speaker: Perwakilan Serikat

question.jepang: 昨今(さっこん)の労働(ろうどう)環境(かんきょう)の変化(へんか)に伴(ともな)い、従業員(じゅうぎょういん)の権利(けんり)保護(ほご)がより重要(じゅうよう)になっております。
question.romaji: Sakkon no roudou kankyou no henka ni tomonai, juugyouin no kenri hogo ga yori juuyou ni natte orimasu.
question.arti: Along with recent changes in the work environment, protecting employee rights has become increasingly important.

choices.jepang: おっしゃる通(とお)りです。特(とく)に残業(ざんぎょう)問題(もんだい)や有給(ゆうきゅう)休暇(きゅうか)の取得(しゅとく)率(りつ)改善(かいぜん)については、会社(かいしゃ)側(がわ)と積極的(せっきょくてき)に交渉(こうしょう)していく必要(ひつよう)があると存(ぞん)じます。
choices.romaji: Ossharu toori desu. Toku ni zangyou mondai ya yuukyuu kyuuka no shutoku-ritsu kaizen ni tsuite wa, kaisha-gawa to sekkyokuteki ni koushou shite iku hitsuyou ga aru to zonjimasu.
choices.arti: Correct. Especially regarding overtime issues and increasing paid leave, active negotiation is needed.

choices.jepang: そんなこと、会社(かいしゃ)が決(き)めることだから、従業員(じゅうぎょういん)には関係(かんけい)ない。
choices.romaji: Sonna koto, kaisha ga kimeru koto dakara, juugyouin ni wa kankei nai.
choices.arti: That kind of thing is the company's business. It has nothing to do with employees.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng raises concrete issues with appropriate keigo. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai cho thấy a misunderstanding about workers' rights.

conversation.speaker: Manajer HRD

question.jepang: 従業員(じゅうぎょういん)の声(こえ)を踏(ふ)まえて、労働(ろうどう)条件(じょうけん)の見直(みなお)しを進(すす)めてまいりたいと考(かんが)えております。
question.romaji: Juugyouin no koe o fumaete, roudou jouken no minaoshi o susumete mairitai to kangaete orimasu.
question.arti: Based on employee feedback, we intend to continue reviewing working conditions.

choices.jepang: 口(くち)だけじゃなくて、実際(じっさい)に行動(こうどう)してください。信用(しんよう)できません。
choices.romaji: Kuchi dake ja nakute, jissai ni koudou shite kudasai. Shinyou dekimasen.
choices.arti: Don't just talk, please take real action. Can't be trusted.

choices.jepang: ありがとうございます。ぜひとも従業員(じゅうぎょういん)の意見(いけん)を反映(はんえい)した改善(かいぜん)策(さく)をご検討(けんとう)いただけますよう、お願(ねが)い申(もう)し上(あ)げます。
choices.romaji: Arigatou gozaimasu. Zehi to mo juugyouin no iken o han'ei shita kaizen-saku o go-kentou itadakemasu you, onegai moushiagemasu.
choices.arti: Thank you. We sincerely request that you consider improvement measures that reflect employee opinions.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng お願い申し上げます (keigo cao nhất) to make a polite request. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is too confrontational.

conversation.speaker: Perwakilan Serikat

question.jepang: 現在(げんざい)の残業(ざんぎょう)時間(じかん)を放置(ほうち)すれば、従業員(じゅうぎょういん)の健康(けんこう)被害(ひがい)につながりかねません。
question.romaji: Genzai no zangyou jikan o houchi sureba, juugyouin no kenkou higai ni tsunagari kanemansen.
question.arti: If the current overtime hours are left as they are, it could lead to harm to employees' health.

choices.jepang: 残業(ざんぎょう)は仕事(しごと)だからしょうがない。文句(もんく)を言(い)うな。
choices.romaji: Zangyou wa shigoto dakara shouganai. Monku o iu na.
choices.arti: Overtime is part of the job. Don't complain.

choices.jepang: ご指摘(してき)の通(とお)りで、過重(かじゅう)労働(ろうどう)は看過(かんか)できない問題(もんだい)です。36協定(さぶろくきょうてい)の範囲(はんい)内(ない)で管理(かんり)できるよう、早急(さっきゅう)に対策(たいさく)を講(こう)じてまいります。
choices.romaji: Go-shiteki no toori de, kajuu roudou wa kanka dekinai mondai desu. Sanburouku kyoutei no hani-nai de kanri dekiru you, sakkyuu ni taisaku o koujite mairimasu.
choices.arti: As you pointed out, overwork is an issue that cannot be ignored. We will take immediate action.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng thừa nhận the problem seriously and references appropriate regulations. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai denies workers' rights.

conversation.speaker: Manajer HRD

question.jepang: 仕事(しごと)量(りょう)が増(ふ)えつつある一方(いっぽう)で、人員(じんいん)補充(ほじゅう)が追(お)いついていない現状(げんじょう)がございます。
question.romaji: Shigoto-ryou ga fuetsutsu aru ippou de, jin'in hojuu ga oitsuite inai genjou ga gozaimasu.
question.arti: Work volume continues to increase, while the addition of personnel is not keeping up.

choices.jepang: 状況(じょうきょう)を踏(ふ)まえまして、人員(じんいん)採用(さいよう)の拡大(かくだい)と業務(ぎょうむ)効率化(こうりつか)を同時(どうじ)に推進(すいしん)せざるを得(え)ないと判断(はんだん)しております。
choices.romaji: Joukyou o fumaemashite, jin'in saiiyou no kakudai to gyoumu kouritsu-ka o douji ni suishin sezaru o enai to handan shite orimasu.
choices.arti: Considering this situation, we have no choice but to simultaneously push for expanded recruitment and operational efficiency.

choices.jepang: それは深刻(しんこく)な問題(もんだい)ですね。採用(さいよう)計画(けいかく)を前倒(まえだお)しにする等(など)、具体的(ぐたいてき)な解決策(かいけつさく)をご提示(ていじ)いただけますでしょうか。
choices.romaji: Sore wa shinkou na mondai desu ne. Saiiyou keikaku o maedaoshi ni suru nado, gutai-teki na kaiketsusaku o go-teiji itadakemasu deshou ka.
choices.arti: That's a serious problem. Could you present concrete solutions, such as accelerating the recruitment plan?

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~を踏まえまして and ~ざるを得ない để cho thấy proactive leadership. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai only requests solutions mà không offering steps of their own.

conversation.speaker: Perwakilan Serikat

question.jepang: 育児(いくじ)休業(きゅうぎょう)の取得(しゅとく)率(りつ)が低(ひく)いにもかかわらず、会社(かいしゃ)として十分(じゅうぶん)な対応(たいおう)がなされていないように見受(みう)けられます。
question.romaji: Ikuji kyuugyou no shutoku-ritsu ga hikui ni mo kakawarazu, kaisha to shite juubun na taiou ga nasarete inai you ni miumeraremasu.
question.arti: Although the parental leave uptake rate is low, it seems the company has not responded adequately.

choices.jepang: 育児(いくじ)は個人(こじん)の問題(もんだい)だから、会社(かいしゃ)には関係(かんけい)ない。
choices.romaji: Ikuji wa kojin no mondai dakara, kaisha ni wa kankei nai.
choices.arti: Childcare is a personal matter. It has nothing to do with the company.

choices.jepang: ご指摘(してき)を真摯(しんし)に受(う)け止(と)めております。育児(いくじ)休業(きゅうぎょう)取得(しゅとく)を促進(そくしん)するための環境(かんきょう)整備(せいび)に、より一層(いっそう)取(と)り組(く)んでまいります。
choices.romaji: Go-shiteki o shinshi ni uketomete orimasu. Ikuji kyuugyou shutoku o sokushin suru tame no kankyou seibi ni, yori issou torikunde mairimasu.
choices.arti: We take your feedback seriously. We will make greater efforts to improve the environment to encourage parental leave uptake.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cho thấy a responsible attitude. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai reflects an outdated perspective.

conversation.speaker: Manajer HRD

question.jepang: テレワークの導入(どうにゅう)が進(すす)みつつありますが、制度(せいど)の整備(せいび)が追(お)いついていないのが現状(げんじょう)です。
question.romaji: Terewaaku no dounyuu ga susumi tsutsu arimasu ga, seido no seibi ga oitsuite inai no ga genjou desu.
question.arti: The implementation of telework is steadily progressing, but system adjustments are not keeping up.

choices.jepang: テレワークは生産性(せいさんせい)が落(お)ちるから反対(はんたい)です。全員(ぜんいん)出社(しゅっしゃ)すべきです。
choices.romaji: Terewaaku wa seisansei ga ochiru kara hantai desu. Zen'in shussha subeki desu.
choices.arti: I oppose telework vì reduces productivity. Everyone should come to the office.

choices.jepang: テレワークの普及(ふきゅう)に伴(ともな)い、評価(ひょうか)基準(きじゅん)や労務(ろうむ)管理(かんり)の見直(みなお)しが不可欠(ふかけつ)です。働(はたら)き方(かた)の多様性(たようせい)を認(みと)めつつ、公平(こうへい)な制度(せいど)を構築(こうちく)すべきだと考(かんが)えます。
choices.romaji: Terewaaku no fukyuu ni tomonai, hyouka kijun ya roumu kanri no minaoshi ga fukaketsu desu. Hatarakikata no tayousei wo mitome tsutsu, kouhei na seido wo kouchiku subeki da to kangaemasu.
choices.arti: Along with the expansion of telework, a review of evaluation standards and labor management is urgently needed. While acknowledging diverse work styles, we must build a fair system.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に伴い and ~つつ phù hợp for mang tính xây dựng analysis. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is quá cứng nhắc.

conversation.speaker: Perwakilan Serikat

question.jepang: ハラスメント対策(たいさく)についても、従業員(じゅうぎょういん)からの不満(ふまん)の声(こえ)が上(あ)がっております。相談(そうだん)窓口(まどぐち)はあるものの、実際(じっさい)には機能(きのう)していないとの指摘(してき)があります。
question.romaji: Harasumento taisaku ni tsuite mo, juugyouin kara no fuman no koe ga agatte orimasu. Soudan madoguchi wa aru mono no, jissai ni wa kinou shite inai to no shiteki ga arimasu.
question.arti: Regarding harassment countermeasures, there are also complaints from employees. Although a consultation desk exists, there are indications it's not actually functioning.

choices.jepang: 重大(じゅうだい)なご指摘(してき)です。相談(そうだん)窓口(まどぐち)があるにもかかわらず機能(きのう)していないということは、制度(せいど)の根本的(こんぽんてき)な見直(みなお)しが必要(ひつよう)だと認識(にんしき)しております。外部(がいぶ)の専門家(せんもんか)を交(まじ)えた改善(かいぜん)を検討(けんとう)いたします。
choices.romaji: Juudai na go-shiteki desu. Soudan madoguchi ga aru ni mo kakawarazu kinou shite inai to iu koto wa, seido no konponteki na minaoshi ga hitsuyou da to ninshiki shite orimasu. Gaibu no senmonka wo majieta kaizen wo kentou itashimasu.
choices.arti: This is serious feedback. The fact that a consultation desk exists but doesn't function indicates the need for fundamental system review. We will consider improvements involving external experts.

choices.jepang: ハラスメントなんて大(おお)げさです。少(すこ)し厳(きび)しくされただけでしょう。
choices.romaji: Harasumento nante oogesa desu. Sukoshi kibishiku sareta dake deshou.
choices.arti: Harassment is an exaggeration. It's just a little harsh treatment.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~にもかかわらず phù hợp và offers concrete solutions. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai xem nhẹ the harassment problem.

conversation.speaker: Manajer HRD

question.jepang: 新(あたら)しい労働(ろうどう)規定(きてい)が整(ととの)い次第(しだい)、全従業員(ぜんじゅうぎょういん)への周知(しゅうち)徹底(てってい)を図(はか)ってまいります。
question.romaji: Atarashii roudou kitei ga totonoi shidai, zen-juugyouin e no shuuchi tettei o hakatte mairimasu.
question.arti: Once the new labor regulations are finalized, we will make efforts to ensure all employees are informed.

choices.jepang: ありがとうございます。規定(きてい)の内容(ないよう)について、従業員(じゅうぎょういん)への説明(せつめい)会(かい)を設(もう)けていただくことは可能(かのう)でしょうか。理解(りかい)を深(ふか)めるためにも、質疑(しつぎ)応答(おうとう)の場(ば)があると望(のぞ)ましいと存(ぞん)じます。
choices.romaji: Arigatou gozaimasu. Kitei no naiyou ni tsuite, juugyouin e no setsumei-kai o moukete itadaku koto wa kanou deshou ka. Rikai o fukameru tame ni mo, shitsugi-outou no ba ga aru to nozomashii to zonjimasu.
choices.arti: Thank you. Would it be possible to hold an explanation session? I think it would be better if there were a Q&A session.

choices.jepang: そうですか。じゃあ、後(あと)で見(み)ておきます。
choices.romaji: Sou desu ka. Jaa, ato de mite okimasu.
choices.arti: I see. I'll check later.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng proactively proposes concrete steps. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is quá thụ động.

conversation.speaker: Perwakilan Serikat

question.jepang: 賃金(ちんぎん)格差(かくさ)の問題(もんだい)についても触(ふ)れさせていただきたいのですが、同(おな)じ業務(ぎょうむ)内容(ないよう)であるにもかかわらず、正社員(せいしゃいん)と非正規(ひせいき)社員(しゃいん)の間(あいだ)に大(おお)きな差(さ)があります。
question.romaji: Chingin kakusa no mondai ni tsuite mo fure sasete itadakitai no desu ga, onaji gyoumu naiyou de aru ni mo kakawarazu, seishain to hiseiki shain no aida ni ooki na sa ga arimasu.
question.arti: I'd also like to touch on the wage gap issue. Despite the same job content, there's a significant difference between regular and non-regular employees.

choices.jepang: 非正規(ひせいき)社員(しゃいん)は非正規(ひせいき)なんだから、給料(きゅうりょう)が低(ひく)いのは当然(とうぜん)です。
choices.romaji: Hiseiki shain wa hiseiki nan dakara, kyuuryou ga hikui no wa touzen desu.
choices.arti: Non-regular employees are non-regular, so it's natural their pay is lower.

choices.jepang: 同一(どういつ)労働(ろうどう)同一(どういつ)賃金(ちんぎん)の原則(げんそく)に基(もと)づき、不合理(ふごうり)な待遇(たいぐう)差(さ)の解消(かいしょう)に取(と)り組(く)んでまいります。法改正(ほうかいせい)を踏(ふ)まえ、来期(らいき)までに是正(ぜせい)計画(けいかく)を策定(さくてい)いたします。
choices.romaji: Douitsu roudou douitsu chingin no gensoku ni motozuki, fugouri na taiguu sa no kaishou ni torikunde mairimasu. Hou kaisei wo fumae, raiki made ni zesei keikaku wo sakutei itashimasu.
choices.arti: Based on the principle of equal pay for equal work, we will strive to eliminate unreasonable differences in treatment. Considering the changes in legislation, we will formulate a correction plan by the next period.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に基づき and ~を踏まえ chuyên nghiệply. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai violates principles of labor fairness.

conversation.speaker: Manajer HRD

question.jepang: 本日(ほんじつ)の議論(ぎろん)を踏(ふ)まえまして、早急(さっきゅう)に改善(かいぜん)案(あん)をまとめ、次回(じかい)の会議(かいぎ)でご報告(ほうこく)申(もう)し上(あ)げます。
question.romaji: Honjitsu no giron wo fumaemashite, sakkyuu ni kaizen an wo matome, jikai no kaigi de go-houkoku moushiagemasu.
question.arti: Based on today's discussion, we will promptly compile an improvement plan and report it at the next meeting.

choices.jepang: 早(はや)くやってくださいよ。もう待(ま)てませんから。
choices.romaji: Hayaku yatte kudasai yo. Mou matemasen kara.
choices.arti: Hurry up. We can't wait any longer.

choices.jepang: 本日(ほんじつ)の協議(きょうぎ)は大変(たいへん)有意義(ゆういぎ)でございました。改善(かいぜん)案(あん)のご報告(ほうこく)をお待(ま)ちしております。従業員(じゅうぎょういん)一同(いちどう)、より良(よ)い職場(しょくば)環境(かんきょう)の実現(じつげん)に向(む)けて協力(きょうりょく)してまいります。
choices.romaji: Honjitsu no kyougi wa taihen yuuigi de gozaimashita. Kaizen an no go-houkoku wo o-machi shite orimasu. Juugyouin ichidou, yori yoi shokuba kankyou no jitsugen ni mukete kyouryoku shite mairimasu.
choices.arti: Today's discussion was very meaningful. We look forward to the improvement plan report. All employees will work together toward realizing a better work environment.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cung cấp a chuyên nghiệp closing with commitment to cooperation. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is quá đòi hỏi and undiplom atic.

title: Thảo luận tin tức thời sự

conversation.speaker: Tanaka

question.jepang: 最近(さいきん)の経済(けいざい)ニュースを読(よ)みましたか？物価(ぶっか)が上(あ)がり続(つづ)けているようですね。
question.romaji: Saikin no keizai nyuusu wo yomimashita ka? Bukka ga agari tsuzukete iru you desu ne.
question.arti: Have you read the latest economic news? Prices seem to keep going up.

choices.jepang: いいえ、全然(ぜんぜん)知(し)りませんでした。ニュースはあまり見(み)ません。
choices.romaji: Iie, zenzen shirimasen deshita. Nyuusu wa amari mimasen.
choices.arti: No, I have no idea at all. I rarely watch the news.

choices.jepang: ええ、読(よ)みました。物価(ぶっか)の上昇(じょうしょう)に伴(ともな)い、生活(せいかつ)費(ひ)も増(ふ)えているそうです。
choices.romaji: Ee, yomimashita. Bukka no joushou ni tomonai, seikatsuhi mo fuete iru sou desu.
choices.arti: Yes, I've read it. Along with the rise in prices, living costs have been increasing too.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に伴い phù hợp. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai shuts down the conversation.

conversation.speaker: Suzuki

question.jepang: 政府(せいふ)はこの状況(じょうきょう)に対(たい)してどのような対策(たいさく)を取(と)るべきだと思(おも)いますか？
question.romaji: Seifu wa kono joukyou ni taishite donna taisaku wo toru beki da to omoimasu ka?
question.arti: In your opinion, what measures should the government take?

choices.jepang: 難(むずか)しい問題(もんだい)ですね。何(なに)も考(かんが)えていません。
choices.romaji: Muzukashii mondai desu ne. Nani mo kangaete imasen.
choices.arti: It's a difficult issue. I haven't thought about anything.

choices.jepang: 現状(げんじょう)を踏(ふ)まえて、補助金(ほじょきん)の拡大(かくだい)や税金(ぜいきん)の軽減(けいげん)などの政策(せいさく)が必要(ひつよう)ではないでしょうか。
choices.romaji: Genjou wo fumaete, hojokin no kakudai ya zeikin no keigen nado no seisaku ga hitsuyou dewa nai deshou ka.
choices.arti: Considering the current situation, aren't policies such as expanding subsidies or tax cuts needed?

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~を踏まえて phù hợp. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai doesn't show active participation.

conversation.speaker: Tanaka

question.jepang: 景気(けいき)が悪(わる)いにもかかわらず、大企業(だいきぎょう)の利益(りえき)は増(ふ)え続(つづ)けているようですが、どう思(おも)いますか？
question.romaji: Keiki ga warui ni mo kakawarazu, daikigyo no rieki wa fue tsuzukete iru you desu ga, dou omoimasu ka?
question.arti: Despite the bad economy, large companies' profits continue to grow. What do you think?

choices.jepang: 本当(ほんとう)に不公平(ふこうへい)だと思(おも)います。格差(かくさ)が広(ひろ)がっているのは問題(もんだい)です。
choices.romaji: Hontou ni fukouhei da to omoimasu. Kakusa ga hirogatte iru no wa mondai desu.
choices.arti: I think that's unfair. The widening gap is a problem.

choices.jepang: 大企業(だいきぎょう)が儲(もう)かるのは当然(とうぜん)です。問題(もんだい)ではありません。
choices.romaji: Daikigyo ga moukaru no wa touzen desu. Mondai dewa arimasen.
choices.arti: It's natural for large companies to profit. That's not a problem.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng đáp lại to the ~にもかかわらず contradiction phù hợp. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai bỏ qua the contradiction.

conversation.speaker: Suzuki

question.jepang: 最近(さいきん)の新聞(しんぶん)には経済(けいざい)ニュースが多(おお)い一方(いっぽう)で、文化(ぶんか)や芸術(げいじゅつ)の記事(きじ)が減(へ)っているように感(かん)じますが。
question.romaji: Saikin no shinbun ni wa keizai nyuusu ga ooi ippou de, bunka ya geijutsu no kiji ga hette iru you ni kanjimasu ga.
question.arti: In newspapers lately, there's a lot of economic news, while cultural and arts articles are decreasing.

choices.jepang: おっしゃる通(とお)りです。経済(けいざい)が重視(じゅうし)される一方(いっぽう)で、文化的(ぶんかてき)な価値(かち)が軽視(けいし)されがちになっているのは問題(もんだい)だと思(おも)います。
choices.romaji: Ossharu toori desu. Keizai ga juushi sareru ippou de, bunkateki na kachi ga keishi saregachi ni natte iru no wa mondai da to omoimasu.
choices.arti: I think there's a problem that while economics is prioritized, cultural values tend to be overlooked.

choices.jepang: 確(たし)かにそうですね。報道(ほうどう)の多様性(たようせい)が失(うしな)われつつあるのは残念(ざんねん)です。
choices.romaji: Tashika ni sou desu ne. Houdou no tayousei ga ushinawaretsutsu aru no wa zannen desu.
choices.arti: That's true. It's really unfortunate that the diversity of reporting is disappearing.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~一方で phù hợp và adds deep analysis. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai uses grammar already used in the question.

conversation.speaker: Tanaka

question.jepang: SNSの普及(ふきゅう)に伴(ともな)い、フェイクニュースの問題(もんだい)も深刻化(しんこくか)しつつありますね。
question.romaji: SNS no fukyuu ni tomonai, feiku nyuusu no mondai mo shinkoku-ka shi tsutsu arimasu ne.
question.arti: Along with the spread of social media, the problem of fake news is getting more serious.

choices.jepang: おっしゃる通(とお)りです。情報(じょうほう)の真偽(しんぎ)を見極(みきわ)めることがますます難(むずか)しくなりつつある中(なか)で、メディアリテラシー教育(きょういく)の重要性(じゅうようせい)が高(たか)まっていると思(おも)います。
choices.romaji: Ossharu toori desu. Jouhou no shingi wo mikiwameru koto ga masumasu muzukashiku nari tsutsu aru naka de, media riterashii kyouiku no juuyousei ga takamatte iru to omoimasu.
choices.arti: Correct. As it becomes increasingly difficult to distinguish truth from falsehood, I believe tầm quan trọng của media literacy education is growing.

choices.jepang: フェイクニュースは見(み)ればすぐわかるから、問題(もんだい)ないと思(おも)います。
choices.romaji: Feiku nyuusu wa mireba sugu wakaru kara, mondai nai to omoimasu.
choices.arti: Fake news is obvious when you see it, so it's not a problem.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~つつある phù hợp. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai xem nhẹ a serious problem.

conversation.speaker: Suzuki

question.jepang: この問題(もんだい)について、新聞社(しんぶんしゃ)に意見(いけん)を送(おく)ろうと思(おも)っているのですが、どうすれば伝(つた)わりやすいでしょうか？
question.romaji: Kono mondai ni tsuite, shinbunsha ni iken wo okurou to omotteiru no desu ga, dou sureba tsutawariyasui deshou ka?
question.arti: I'm thinking of sending an opinion piece to a newspaper company. What's the best way to make my point?

choices.jepang: 感情的(かんじょうてき)に書(か)いた方(ほう)がいいです。読(よ)む人(ひと)の心(こころ)に響(ひび)きます。
choices.romaji: Kanjouteki ni kaita hou ga ii desu. Yomu hito no kokoro ni hibikimasu.
choices.arti: It's better to write emotionally. It will touch readers' hearts.

choices.jepang: 具体的(ぐたいてき)なデータや事例(じれい)を踏(ふ)まえて、論理的(ろんりてき)に書(か)くのが効果的(こうかてき)だと思(おも)います。
choices.romaji: Gutaiteki na deeta ya jirei wo fumaete, ronriteki ni kaku no ga koukateki da to omoimasu.
choices.arti: Writing logically with concrete data and case examples in mind would be effective.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~を踏まえて and gợi ý a fact-based approach. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is not the right approach for opinion letters to media.

conversation.speaker: Tanaka

question.jepang: 新聞(しんぶん)の購読者(こうどくしゃ)が減(へ)っている一方(いっぽう)で、ネットニュースの利用者(りようしゃ)は増(ふ)えていますよね。これは新聞(しんぶん)の終(お)わりを意味(いみ)するのでしょうか。
question.romaji: Shinbun no koudokusha ga hette iru ippou de, netto nyuusu no riyousha wa fuete imasu yo ne. Kore wa shinbun no owari wo imi suru no deshou ka.
question.arti: Newspaper subscribers are decreasing while online news users are increasing. Does this mean the end of newspapers?

choices.jepang: もう新聞(しんぶん)は必要(ひつよう)ありません。全部(ぜんぶ)ネットで読(よ)めますから。
choices.romaji: Mou shinbun wa hitsuyou arimasen. Zenbu netto de yomemasu kara.
choices.arti: Newspapers are no longer needed. Everything can be read online.

choices.jepang: 購読者(こうどくしゃ)が減(へ)っているからといって、新聞(しんぶん)の価値(かち)がなくなるわけではありません。質(しつ)の高(たか)い報道(ほうどう)は今後(こんご)も求(もと)められるに違(ちが)いありません。
choices.romaji: Koudokusha ga hette iru kara to itte, shinbun no kachi ga nakunaru wake de wa arimasen. Shitsu no takai houdou wa kongo mo motomerareru ni chigai arimasen.
choices.arti: Even though subscribers are decreasing, it doesn't mean giá trị của newspapers has disappeared. High-quality reporting will surely continue to be needed in the future.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~からといって and ~に違いない phù hợp. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai oversimplifies the issue.

conversation.speaker: Suzuki

question.jepang: 報道(ほうどう)の自由(じゆう)についてはどう思(おも)いますか？政府(せいふ)による規制(きせい)は必要(ひつよう)でしょうか。
question.romaji: Houdou no jiyuu ni tsuite wa dou omoimasu ka? Seifu ni yoru kisei wa hitsuyou deshou ka.
question.arti: What do you think about press freedom? Is government regulation necessary?

choices.jepang: 報道(ほうどう)の自由(じゆう)は民主主義(みんしゅしゅぎ)の根幹(こんかん)である以上(いじょう)、安易(あんい)に制限(せいげん)するわけにはいきません。ただし、人権(じんけん)侵害(しんがい)やプライバシーの保護(ほご)とのバランスは考慮(こうりょ)せざるを得(え)ないでしょう。
choices.romaji: Houdou no jiyuu wa minshu shugi no konkan de aru ijou, an'i ni seigen suru wake ni wa ikimasen. Tadashi, jinken shingai ya puraibashii no hogo to no baransu wa kouryo sezaru wo enai deshou.
choices.arti: Because press freedom is the foundation of democracy, it cannot be easily restricted. However, the balance with human rights and privacy protection must be considered.

choices.jepang: 政府(せいふ)が全(すべ)てを規制(きせい)すべきです。危(あぶ)ない情報(じょうほう)は禁止(きんし)した方(ほう)がいいです。
choices.romaji: Seifu ga subete wo kisei subeki desu. Abunai jouhou wa kinshi shita hou ga ii desu.
choices.arti: The government should regulate everything. Dangerous information should be banned.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~わけにはいかない and ~ざるを得ない for a cân bằng argument. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai supports excessive censorship.

conversation.speaker: Tanaka

question.jepang: 情報(じょうほう)が溢(あふ)れている今(いま)、信頼(しんらい)できる情報源(じょうほうげん)を選(えら)ぶのは難(むずか)しいですよね。
question.romaji: Jouhou ga afurete iru ima, shinrai dekiru jouhougen wo erabu no wa muzukashii desu yo ne.
question.arti: In this era of information overload, it's really difficult to choose reliable sources.

choices.jepang: 何(なに)も考(かんが)えずに全部(ぜんぶ)信(しん)じればいいと思(おも)います。
choices.romaji: Nani mo kangaezu ni zenbu shinjireba ii to omoimasu.
choices.arti: Just believe everything mà không thinking.

choices.jepang: そうですね。複数(ふくすう)の情報源(じょうほうげん)を比較(ひかく)しなければならないため、情報(じょうほう)リテラシーを高(たか)めていかざるを得(え)ないですね。
choices.romaji: Sou desu ne. Fukusuu no jouhougen wo hikaku shinakereba naranai tame, jouhou riterashii wo takamete ika zaruwoenai desu ne.
choices.arti: Correct. Since we must compare multiple sources, we have no choice but to improve our information literacy.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~ざるを得ない phù hợp. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai cho thấy a nguy hiểm attitude.

conversation.speaker: Suzuki

question.jepang: 今日(きょう)はいろいろな話(はなし)ができて良(よ)かったです。ニュースについて深(ふか)く考(かんが)えるきっかけになりました。
question.romaji: Kyou wa iroirona hanashi ga dekite yokatta desu. Nyuusu ni tsuite fukaku kangaeru kikkake ni narimashita.
question.arti: It was nice chatting about many things today. It was a chance to think deeply about the news.

choices.jepang: そうですね。ニュースに対(たい)して受(う)け身(み)ではなく、批判的(ひはんてき)に考(かんが)える姿勢(しせい)を持(も)ち続(つづ)けることが大切(たいせつ)ですね。また話(はな)しましょう。
choices.romaji: Sou desu ne. Nyuusu ni taishite ukemi de wa naku, hihanteki ni kangaeru shisei wo mochi tsuzukeru koto ga taisetsu desu ne. Mata hanashimashou.
choices.arti: Yes. It's important to always have a critical thinking attitude toward news, not a passive one. Let's chat again.

choices.jepang: こういう議論(ぎろん)は時間(じかん)の無駄(むだ)だと思(おも)います。
choices.romaji: Kouiu giron wa jikan no muda da to omoimasu.
choices.arti: I think discussions like this are a waste of time.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cung cấp a meaningful closing about tầm quan trọng của critical thinking. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai xem nhẹ tầm quan trọng của discussion.

title: Thuyết trình tại hội thảo

conversation.speaker: Moderator

question.jepang: それでは、田中(たなか)さん、今日(きょう)の発表(はっぴょう)を始(はじ)めていただけますか？
question.romaji: Sore dewa, Tanaka-san, kyou no happyou wo hajimete itadakemasu ka?
question.arti: Well then, Tanaka-san, could you begin the presentation?

choices.jepang: はい、ただいまより発表(はっぴょう)を始(はじ)めさせていただきます。本日(ほんじつ)はお時間(じかん)をいただき、ありがとうございます。
choices.romaji: Hai, tadaima yori happyou wo hajimesasete itadakimasu. Honjitsu wa ojikan wo itadaki, arigatou gozaimasu.
choices.arti: Yes, allow me to begin the presentation now. Thank you for your time.

choices.jepang: え、もう始(はじ)めるんですか？まだ準備(じゅんび)ができていません。
choices.romaji: E, mou hajimeru n desu ka? Mada junbi ga dekite imasen.
choices.arti: Huh, already starting? I'm not ready yet.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~させていただきます (keigo) appropriate for a formal seminar. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai cho thấy unpreparedness.

conversation.speaker: Tanaka

question.jepang: 本日(ほんじつ)の発表(はっぴょう)では、研究(けんきゅう)結果(けっか)を踏(ふ)まえて、新(あたら)しい提案(ていあん)をさせていただきたいと思(おも)います。
question.romaji: Honjitsu no happyou dewa, kenkyuu kekka wo fumaete, atarashii teian wo sasete itadakitai to omoimasu.
question.arti: In today's presentation, based on research results, I would like to make a new proposal.

choices.jepang: 素晴(すば)らしいですね。どのような提案(ていあん)か、楽(たの)しみにしています。
choices.romaji: Subarashii desu ne. Donna teian ka, tanoshimi ni shite imasu.
choices.arti: Great. I'm looking forward to the proposal.

choices.jepang: 承知(しょうち)いたしました。研究(けんきゅう)結果(けっか)に基(もと)づいた提案(ていあん)とのことで、非常(ひじょう)に興味(きょうみ)深(ぶか)く拝聴(はいちょう)いたします。
choices.romaji: Shouchi itashimashita. Kenkyuu kekka ni motozuita teian to no koto de, hijou ni kyoumibukaku haichou itashimasu.
choices.arti: I understand. Since it's a proposal based on research, I will listen with great interest.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng very keigo cao (承知いたしました, 拝聴いたします). Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is quá suồng sã.

conversation.speaker: Peserta

question.jepang: 発表(はっぴょう)の内容(ないよう)は興味深(きょうみぶか)い一方(いっぽう)で、いくつか疑問点(ぎもんてん)もあります。質問(しつもん)してもよろしいでしょうか？
question.romaji: Happyou no naiyou wa kyoumibukaii ippou de, ikutsuka gimonten mo arimasu. Shitsumon shite mo yoroshii deshou ka?
question.arti: The presentation content is interesting, but there are some things I'd like to question. May I ask?

choices.jepang: もちろんです。ご質問(しつもん)をどうぞ。できる限(かぎ)りお答(こた)えいたします。
choices.romaji: Mochiron desu. Goshitsumon wo douzo. Dekiru kagiri okotae itashimasu.
choices.arti: Of course. Please go ahead. I will answer to the best of my ability.

choices.jepang: 質問(しつもん)は後(あと)でいいですか？今(いま)は忙(いそが)しいです。
choices.romaji: Shitsumon wa ato de ii desu ka? Ima wa isogashii desu.
choices.arti: Can you ask later? I'm busy right now.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng appropriate keigo. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is very thiếu lịch sự.

conversation.speaker: Peserta

question.jepang: データが古(ふる)いにもかかわらず、その結果(けっか)を現在(げんざい)に適用(てきよう)するのは問題(もんだい)ではないでしょうか？
question.romaji: Deeta ga furui ni mo kakawarazu, sono kekka wo genzai ni tekiyou suru no wa mondai dewa nai deshou ka?
question.arti: Although the data is old, isn't there a problem applying the results now?

choices.jepang: 鋭(するど)いご指摘(してき)をありがとうございます。確(たし)かにその点(てん)は課題(かだい)ですが、最新(さいしん)の動向(どうこう)を踏(ふ)まえた補足(ほそく)データも用意(ようい)しております。
choices.romaji: Surudoi goshiteki wo arigatou gozaimasu. Tashika ni sono ten wa kadai desu ga, saishin no doukou wo fumaeta hosoku deeta mo youi shite orimasu.
choices.arti: Thank you for the sharp feedback. I have also prepared supplementary data that considers recent trends.

choices.jepang: ご指摘(してき)はもっともです。ただ、データが古(ふる)い点(てん)は認(みと)めざるを得(え)ませんが、基本的(きほんてき)な傾向(けいこう)は現在(げんざい)にも当(あ)てはまると考(かんが)えております。
choices.romaji: Goshiteki wa mottomo desu. Tada, deeta ga furui ten wa mitome zaruwoe masen ga, kihonteki na keikou wa genzai ni mo atehamaru to kangaete orimasu.
choices.arti: Your point is correct. I must admit the data is old, but the basic trend still holds.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cho thấy thorough preparation with supplementary data. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is less convincing.

conversation.speaker: Tanaka

question.jepang: このプロジェクトは来月(らいげつ)から本格的(ほんかくてき)に始動(しどう)する予定(よてい)ですが、予算(よさん)が確保(かくほ)でき次第(しだい)、すぐに動(うご)き始(はじ)めます。
question.romaji: Kono purojekuto wa raigetsu kara honkakuteki ni shidou suru yotei desu ga, yosan ga kakuho deki shidai, sugu ni ugoki hajimemasu.
question.arti: This project is planned to start next month. Once the budget is secured, we'll move right away.

choices.jepang: 承知(しょうち)しました。予算(よさん)の確保(かくほ)が完了(かんりょう)し次第(しだい)、ご連絡(れんらく)をいただけますでしょうか。
choices.romaji: Shouchi shimashita. Yosan no kakuho ga kanryou shi shidai, gorenraku wo itadakemasu deshou ka.
choices.arti: I understand. Once the budget is secured, could you contact us?

choices.jepang: わかりました。でも来月(らいげつ)は無理(むり)だと思(おも)います。もっと時間(じかん)が必要(ひつよう)です。
choices.romaji: Wakarimashita. Demo raigetsu wa muri da to omoimasu. Motto jikan ga hitsuyou desu.
choices.arti: Understood. But next month is impossible. More time is needed.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~次第 phù hợp. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai rejects the timeline mà không a strong reason.

conversation.speaker: Peserta

question.jepang: 先(さき)ほどの提案(ていあん)について、実現(じつげん)可能性(かのうせい)はどの程度(ていど)だとお考(かんが)えですか？理想的(りそうてき)ではあるものの、実際(じっさい)には難(むずか)しいのではないでしょうか。
question.romaji: Sakihodo no teian ni tsuite, jitsugen kanousei wa dono teido da to o-kangae desu ka? Risouteki de wa aru mono no, jissai ni wa muzukashii no de wa nai deshou ka.
question.arti: About the proposal earlier, how realistic do you think it is? Although ideal, isn't it actually difficult?

choices.jepang: 絶対(ぜったい)にできます。問題(もんだい)ありません。
choices.romaji: Zettai ni dekimasu. Mondai arimasen.
choices.arti: It will definitely work. No problem.

choices.jepang: 確(たし)かに課題(かだい)は多(おお)いですが、段階的(だんかいてき)に実施(じっし)することで、実現(じつげん)は十分(じゅうぶん)可能(かのう)だと考(かんが)えております。先行(せんこう)事例(じれい)に基(もと)づいた実施(じっし)計画(けいかく)もご用意(ようい)しております。
choices.romaji: Tashika ni kadai wa ooi desu ga, dankai-teki ni jisshi suru koto de, jitsugen wa juubun kanou da to kangaete orimasu. Senkou jirei ni motozuita jisshi keikaku mo go-youi shite orimasu.
choices.arti: Indeed there are many challenges, but with phased implementation, I think it's quite realistic. We've also prepared an implementation plan based on previous case studies.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に基づいた phù hợp và honestly thừa nhận challenges. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is quá tự tin mà không evidence.

conversation.speaker: Moderator

question.jepang: 他(ほか)にご質問(しつもん)はございませんでしょうか。時間(じかん)が限(かぎ)られておりますので、あと一(ひと)つだけお受(う)けいたします。
question.romaji: Hoka ni go-shitsumon wa gozaimasen deshou ka. Jikan ga kagirarete orimasu node, ato hitotsu dake o-uke itashimasu.
question.arti: Are there any other questions? Since time is limited, we'll accept one more.

choices.jepang: 今回(こんかい)の研究(けんきゅう)が社会(しゃかい)にもたらす影響(えいきょう)について、どのようにお考(かんが)えですか？
choices.romaji: Konkai no kenkyuu ga shakai ni motarasu eikyou ni tsuite, dono you ni o-kangae desu ka?
choices.arti: Regarding the societal impact of this research, what is your view?

choices.jepang: もう質問(しつもん)はありません。
choices.romaji: Mou shitsumon wa arimasen.
choices.arti: No more questions.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng takes advantage of the last opportunity để hỏi an important question. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai misses a valuable opportunity.

conversation.speaker: Tanaka

question.jepang: 社会(しゃかい)実装(じっそう)に向(む)けては、産学(さんがく)連携(れんけい)が不可欠(ふかけつ)です。大学(だいがく)の研究(けんきゅう)だけでは限界(げんかい)があるからこそ、企業(きぎょう)との協力(きょうりょく)を模索(もさく)しております。
question.romaji: Shakai jissou ni mukete wa, sangaku renkei ga fukaketsu desu. Daigaku no kenkyuu dake de wa genkai ga aru kara koso, kigyou to no kyouryoku wo mosaku shite orimasu.
question.arti: For social implementation, industry-academia cooperation is essential. Precisely because university research alone has its limits, we are seeking cooperation with companies.

choices.jepang: 企業(きぎょう)に頼(たよ)らなくても大丈夫(だいじょうぶ)です。
choices.romaji: Kigyou ni tayoranakute mo daijoubu desu.
choices.arti: You don't need to rely on companies.

choices.jepang: なるほど。企業(きぎょう)の技術(ぎじゅつ)力(りょく)と大学(だいがく)の知見(ちけん)を組(く)み合(あ)わせることで、社会(しゃかい)への還元(かんげん)が加速(かそく)する可能性(かのうせい)がありますね。
choices.romaji: Naruhodo. Kigyou no gijutsu-ryoku to daigaku no chiken wo kumiawaseru koto de, shakai e no kangen ga kasoku suru kanousei ga arimasu ne.
choices.arti: I see. By combining companies' technological capabilities with university knowledge, there's potential to accelerate contributions to society.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cho thấy understanding of collaboration. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai bỏ qua tầm quan trọng của cooperation.

conversation.speaker: Moderator

question.jepang: 田中(たなか)さんの発表(はっぴょう)はいかがでしたでしょうか？皆様(みなさま)からご感想(かんそう)をいただけますと幸(さいわ)いです。
question.romaji: Tanaka-san no happyou wa ikaga deshita deshou ka? Minasama kara gokansou wo itadakemasu to saiwai desu.
question.arti: How was Tanaka-san's presentation? We'd appreciate it if you could share your impressions.

choices.jepang: 特(とく)にありません。早(はや)く終(お)わってほしいです。
choices.romaji: Toku ni arimasen. Hayaku owatte hoshii desu.
choices.arti: Nothing special. I just want to finish quickly.

choices.jepang: 大変(たいへん)興味深(きょうみぶか)い発表(はっぴょう)でした。研究(けんきゅう)の成果(せいか)が社会(しゃかい)に広(ひろ)まりつつある現状(げんじょう)を踏(ふ)まえると、この提案(ていあん)は非常(ひじょう)に時宜(じぎ)を得(え)たものだと感(かん)じました。
choices.romaji: Taihen kyoumibukaku happyou deshita. Kenkyuu no seika ga shakai ni hiromatsu tsu aru genjou wo fumaeru to, kono teian wa hijou ni jigi wo eta mono da to kanjimashita.
choices.arti: The presentation was very interesting. Considering that research results are spreading into society, this proposal is very timely.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~つつある and ~を踏まえる. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is thiếu lịch sự.

conversation.speaker: Tanaka

question.jepang: 皆様(みなさま)、本日(ほんじつ)はご清聴(せいちょう)いただき、誠(まこと)にありがとうございました。いただいたご意見(いけん)を踏(ふ)まえ、研究(けんきゅう)をさらに発展(はってん)させてまいります。
question.romaji: Minasama, honjitsu wa go-seichou itadaki, makoto ni arigatou gozaimashita. Itadaita go-iken wo fumae, kenkyuu wo sarani hatten sasete mairimasu.
question.arti: Thank you for listening today. Based on the feedback given, we will develop the research further.

choices.jepang: お疲(つか)れ様(さま)でした。帰(かえ)りましょう。
choices.romaji: O-tsukare-sama deshita. Kaerimashou.
choices.arti: Thanks for your hard work. Let's go home.

choices.jepang: 田中(たなか)さん、素晴(すば)らしい発表(はっぴょう)でした。今後(こんご)の研究(けんきゅう)の進展(しんてん)を楽(たの)しみにしております。本日(ほんじつ)のセミナーはこれをもちまして閉会(へいかい)とさせていただきます。
choices.romaji: Tanaka-san, subarashii happyou deshita. Kongo no kenkyuu no shinten wo tanoshimi ni shite orimasu. Honjitsu no seminaa wa kore wo mochimashite heikai to sasete itadakimasu.
choices.arti: Tanaka-san, that was an excellent presentation. We look forward to the future development of the research. With this, we conclude today's seminar.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng keigo cao for a formal closing. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is quá suồng sã.

title: Vấn đề hợp đồng thuê nhà

conversation.speaker: Penyewa

question.jepang: すみません、契約(けいやく)の更新(こうしん)について相談(そうだん)があるのですが、少(すこ)しよろしいでしょうか？
question.romaji: Sumimasen, keiyaku no koushin ni tsuite soudan ga aru no desu ga, sukoshi yoroshii deshou ka?
question.arti: Excuse me, I'd like to consult about the contract renewal. Do you have a moment?

choices.jepang: はい、もちろんです。どうぞお掛(か)けになってください。どのようなご相談(そうだん)でしょうか？
choices.romaji: Hai, mochiron desu. Douzo okake ni natte kudasai. Donna gosoudan deshou ka?
choices.arti: Of course. Please have a seat. What would you like to consult about?

choices.jepang: 今(いま)は忙(いそが)しいので、また後(あと)で来(き)てください。
choices.romaji: Ima wa isogashii node, mata ato de kite kudasai.
choices.arti: I'm busy now. Come back later.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng appropriate keigo for customer service. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is thiếu lịch sự.

conversation.speaker: Penyewa

question.jepang: 実(じつ)は、家賃(やちん)の値上(ねあ)がりに伴(ともな)い、今(いま)の部屋(へや)を続(つづ)けて借(か)りることが難(むずか)しくなってきました。
question.romaji: Jitsu wa, yachin no neagari ni tomonai, ima no heya wo tsuzukete kariru koto ga muzukashiku natte kimashita.
question.arti: Actually, as the rent increases, it's becoming harder to continue renting this room.

choices.jepang: それは大変(たいへん)でしたね。値上(ねあ)がりはこちらも仕方(しかた)なくて、申(もう)し訳(わけ)ございません。
choices.romaji: Sore wa taihen deshita ne. Neagari wa kochira mo shikata nakute, moushiwake gozaimasen.
choices.arti: That must be tough. We apologize as the price increase from our end was also unavoidable.

choices.jepang: そうでしたか。ご事情(じじょう)はよくわかります。現在(げんざい)の家賃(やちん)についてですが、何(なに)か交渉(こうしょう)の余地(よち)がないか確認(かくにん)させていただけますでしょうか。
choices.romaji: Sou deshita ka. Gojijou wa yoku wakarimasu. Genzai no yachin ni tsuite desu ga, nanika koushou no yochi ga nai ka kakunin sasete itadakemasu deshou ka.
choices.arti: I see. I understand your situation. May I check if there's room for negotiation?

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng is chuyên nghiệp and proactive. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai only apologizes mà không offering a solution.

conversation.speaker: Staf

question.jepang: 家賃(やちん)の値下(ねさ)げは難(むずか)しいにもかかわらず、長期(ちょうき)契約(けいやく)をいただける場合(ばあい)は、礼金(れいきん)の免除(めんじょ)が可能(かのう)かもしれません。
question.romaji: Yachin no nesage wa muzukashii ni mo kakawarazu, chouki keiyaku wo itadakeru baai wa, reikin no menjo ga kanou kamoshiremasen.
question.arti: Although a rent reduction is difficult, if you sign a long-term contract, the key money could be waived.

choices.jepang: 礼金(れいきん)の免除(めんじょ)だけでは足(た)りません。家賃(やちん)も下(さ)げてください。
choices.romaji: Reikin no menjo dake dewa tarimasen. Yachin mo sagete kudasai.
choices.arti: Just waiving key money isn't enough. Lower the rent too.

choices.jepang: そうですか、それは助(たす)かります。長期(ちょうき)契約(けいやく)の場合(ばあい)、何年(なんねん)からになりますか？
choices.romaji: Sou desu ka, sore wa tasukarimasu. Chouki keiyaku no baai, nannen kara ni narimasu ka?
choices.arti: I see, that's helpful. For a long-term contract, starting from how many years?

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng đáp lại positively and requests clarification. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is quá đòi hỏi.

conversation.speaker: Penyewa

question.jepang: 実(じつ)は、隣(となり)の部屋(へや)から騒音(そうおん)が聞(き)こえる一方(いっぽう)で、管理(かんり)会社(がいしゃ)への連絡(れんらく)もなかなか通(つう)じないという問題(もんだい)もあります。
question.romaji: Jitsu wa, tonari no heya kara souon ga kikoeru ippou de, kanri gaisha e no renraku mo nakanaka tsuujinai to iu mondai mo arimasu.
question.arti: Actually, there's noise from the neighboring room, and contacting the management company is also difficult.

choices.jepang: ご不便(ふべん)をおかけして誠(まこと)に申(もう)し訳(わけ)ございません。騒音(そうおん)の件(けん)につきましては、本日(ほんじつ)中(じゅう)に隣室(りんしつ)の入居者(にゅうきょしゃ)に注意(ちゅうい)するよう連絡(れんらく)いたします。また、連絡(れんらく)体制(たいせい)の改善(かいぜん)についても上(うえ)に報告(ほうこく)いたします。
choices.romaji: Gofuben wo okake shite makoto ni moushiwake gozaimasen. Souon no ken ni tsukimashite wa, honjitsu juu ni rinshitsu no nyuukyosha ni chuui suru you renraku itashimasu. Mata, renraku taisei no kaizen ni tsuite mo ue ni houkoku itashimasu.
choices.arti: We apologize. Regarding the noise, we will contact the neighboring tenant today for a warning. We will also report improvement of the communication system to management.

choices.jepang: それは申(もう)し訳(わけ)ございませんでした。騒音(そうおん)の問題(もんだい)は早急(さっきゅう)に対応(たいおう)しなければならないため、今後(こんご)は担当者(たんとうしゃ)が直接(ちょくせつ)対応(たいおう)できる体制(たいせい)を整(ととの)えます。
choices.romaji: Sore wa moushiwake gozaimasen deshita. Souon no mondai wa sakkyuu ni taiou shinakereba naranai tame, kongo wa tantousha ga chokusetsu taiou dekiru taisei wo totonoemas.
choices.arti: We apologize. Since the noise problem must be handled promptly, going forward we will prepare a system where staff respond immediately.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cung cấp concrete action with a clear timeline. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is less specific.

conversation.speaker: Staf

question.jepang: 契約(けいやく)書(しょ)には修繕(しゅうぜん)費用(ひよう)は借主(かりぬし)負担(ふたん)と書(か)いてありますが、エアコンの故障(こしょう)についてはどうなりますか？
question.romaji: Keiyakusho ni wa shuuzen hiyou wa karinushi futan to kaite arimasu ga, eakon no koshou ni tsuite wa dou narimasu ka?
question.arti: The contract states repair costs are borne by the tenant, but what about the broken air conditioner?

choices.jepang: エアコンは設備(せつび)ですので、通常(つうじょう)は貸主(かしぬし)側(がわ)で対応(たいおう)せざるを得(え)ません。契約書(けいやくしょ)の内容(ないよう)を再確認(さいかくにん)いたします。
choices.romaji: Eakon wa setsubi desu node, tsuujou wa kashinushi gawa de taiou sezaruwoe masen. Keiyakusho no naiyou wo saikakunin itashimasu.
choices.arti: Since the air conditioner is a facility, usually the owner must handle it. We will recheck the contract contents.

choices.jepang: エアコンも借主(かりぬし)の責任(せきにん)です。自分(じぶん)で修理(しゅうり)してください。
choices.romaji: Eakon mo karinushi no sekinin desu. Jibun de shuuri shite kudasai.
choices.arti: The air conditioner is also the tenant's responsibility. Please repair it yourself.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~ざるを得ない phù hợp và is legally correct. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is legally incorrect.

conversation.speaker: Penyewa

question.jepang: 退去(たいきょ)時(じ)の原状回復(げんじょうかいふく)費用(ひよう)についても確認(かくにん)しておきたいのですが、どこまでが借主(かりぬし)の負担(ふたん)になりますか？
question.romaji: Taikyo-ji no genjou kaifuku hiyou ni tsuite mo kakunin shite okitai no desu ga, doko made ga karinushi no futan ni narimasu ka?
question.arti: I'd also like to confirm about restoration costs when moving out. How far is the tenant responsible?

choices.jepang: 通常(つうじょう)の使用(しよう)による経年(けいねん)劣化(れっか)は貸主(かしぬし)負担(ふたん)ですが、借主(かりぬし)の過失(かしつ)による損傷(そんしょう)は借主(かりぬし)負担(ふたん)となります。ガイドラインに基(もと)づいてご説明(せつめい)いたします。
choices.romaji: Tsuujou no shiyou ni yoru keinen rekka wa kashinushi futan desu ga, karinushi no kashitsu ni yoru sonshou wa karinushi futan to narimasu. Gaidorain ni motozuite go-setsumei itashimasu.
choices.arti: Damage from normal wear is borne by the owner, but damage from tenant negligence is the tenant's responsibility. I will explain based on the guidelines.

choices.jepang: 全部(ぜんぶ)借主(かりぬし)の負担(ふたん)です。それが契約(けいやく)です。
choices.romaji: Zenbu karinushi no futan desu. Sore ga keiyaku desu.
choices.arti: Everything is borne by the tenant. That's the contract.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に基づいて phù hợp và is legally correct. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is legally incorrect.

conversation.speaker: Staf

question.jepang: 敷金(しききん)の返還(へんかん)につきましては、退去(たいきょ)後(ご)の確認(かくにん)が完了(かんりょう)し次第(しだい)、ご指定(してい)の口座(こうざ)にお振(ふ)り込(こ)みいたします。
question.romaji: Shikikin no henkan ni tsukimashite wa, taikyo-go no kakunin ga kanryou shi shidai, go-shitei no kouza ni o-furikomi itashimasu.
question.arti: Regarding the security deposit refund, once the post-move-out inspection is complete, we will transfer it to the designated account.

choices.jepang: わかりました。早(はや)く返(かえ)してくださいね。
choices.romaji: Wakarimashita. Hayaku kaeshite kudasai ne.
choices.arti: Understood. Please return it quickly.

choices.jepang: 承知(しょうち)いたしました。返還(へんかん)までどのくらいの期間(きかん)がかかりますでしょうか。また、万(まん)が一(いち)返還(へんかん)が遅(おく)れた場合(ばあい)はどうなりますか。
choices.romaji: Shouchi itashimashita. Henkan made dono kurai no kikan ga kakarimasu deshou ka. Mata, man ga ichi henkan ga okureta baai wa dou narimasu ka.
choices.arti: I understand. Approximately how long until the refund? And if the refund is delayed, what happens?

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng asks important details chuyên nghiệply. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is too informal.

conversation.speaker: Penyewa

question.jepang: 更新料(こうしんりょう)の金額(きんがく)について、もう少(すこ)し交渉(こうしょう)の余地(よち)はございませんでしょうか。
question.romaji: Koushinryou no kingaku ni tsuite, mou sukoshi koushou no yochi wa gozaimasen deshou ka.
question.arti: Regarding the renewal fee amount, is there still room for negotiation?

choices.jepang: オーナーと相談(そうだん)の上(うえ)、可能(かのう)な範囲(はんい)で調整(ちょうせい)できるか確認(かくにん)いたします。長期(ちょうき)のご入居(にゅうきょ)をいただいているお客様(きゃくさま)ですので、ある程度(ていど)の配慮(はいりょ)はできるかと存(ぞん)じます。
choices.romaji: Oonaa to soudan no ue, kanou na han'i de chousei dekiru ka kakunin itashimasu. Chouki no go-nyuukyo wo itadaite iru o-kyaku-sama desu node, aru teido no hairyo wa dekiru ka to zonjimasu.
choices.arti: After discussing with the owner, we'll check if it can be adjusted within possible limits. Since you're a long-term tenant, I think certain considerations can be made.

choices.jepang: 更新料(こうしんりょう)は一切(いっさい)変更(へんこう)できません。
choices.romaji: Koushinryou wa issai henkou dekimasen.
choices.arti: The renewal fee absolutely cannot be changed.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cho thấy flexibility and values loyal customers. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is quá cứng nhắc.

conversation.speaker: Staf

question.jepang: 契約(けいやく)更新(こうしん)の書類(しょるい)が整(ととの)い次第(しだい)、ご連絡(れんらく)いたしますので、もうしばらくお待(ま)ちください。
question.romaji: Keiyaku koushin no shorui ga totonoi shidai, go-renraku itashimasu node, mou shibaraku o-machi kudasai.
question.arti: Once the renewal contract documents are ready, we'll contact you, so please wait a moment.

choices.jepang: 早(はや)くしてください。いつまで待(ま)たせるんですか。
choices.romaji: Hayaku shite kudasai. Itsu made mataseru n desu ka.
choices.arti: Hurry up. How long are you going to make me wait?

choices.jepang: わかりました。ご連絡(れんらく)をお待(ま)ちしております。それまでに、こちらでも検討(けんとう)事項(じこう)をまとめておきます。
choices.romaji: Wakarimashita. Go-renraku wo o-machi shite orimasu. Sore made ni, kochira demo kentou jikou wo matomete okimasu.
choices.arti: Understood. I'll wait for your contact. Until then, from our side we'll also compile the points that need consideration.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cho thấy a cooperative attitude. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is thiếu lịch sự.

conversation.speaker: Penyewa

question.jepang: 本日(ほんじつ)はお忙(いそが)しい中(なか)、丁寧(ていねい)にご対応(たいおう)いただきありがとうございました。引(ひ)き続(つづ)きよろしくお願(ねが)いいたします。
question.romaji: Honjitsu wa o-isogashii naka, teinei ni go-taiou itadaki arigatou gozaimashita. Hikitsuzuki yoroshiku onegai itashimasu.
question.arti: Thank you for responding kindly today despite being busy. We look forward to your continued patronage.

choices.jepang: こちらこそ、ご来店(らいてん)いただきありがとうございました。何(なに)かございましたら、いつでもお気軽(きがる)にご連絡(れんらく)ください。お客様(きゃくさま)にご満足(まんぞく)いただけるようサポートしてまいります。
choices.romaji: Kochira koso, go-raiten itadaki arigatou gozaimashita. Nanika gozaimashitara, itsu demo o-kigaru ni go-renraku kudasai. O-kyaku-sama ni go-manzoku itadakeru you sapooto shite mairimasu.
choices.arti: It is we who should thank you for coming. If there's anything, don't hesitate to contact us anytime. We will support you to your satisfaction.

choices.jepang: はい、さようなら。
choices.romaji: Hai, sayounara.
choices.arti: Yes, see you.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cung cấp a chuyên nghiệp closing. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is quá ngắn gọn.

title: Tại hải quan sân bay

conversation.speaker: Nhan vien

question.jepang: パスポートと税関(ぜいかん)申告書(しんこくしょ)をご提示(ていじ)ください。日本(にほん)への入国(にゅうこく)目的(もくてき)は何(なん)でしょうか？
question.romaji: Pasupooto to zeikan shinkokusho wo goteiji kudasai. Nihon e no nyuukoku mokuteki wa nan deshou ka?
question.arti: Please show your passport and customs form. What is the purpose of your entry to Japan?

choices.jepang: 観光(かんこう)目的(もくてき)で参(まい)りました。二週間(にしゅうかん)ほど滞在(たいざい)する予定(よてい)でございます。
choices.romaji: Kankou mokuteki de mairimashita. Nishuukan hodo taizai suru yotei de gozaimasu.
choices.arti: I've come for sightseeing. I plan to stay for about two weeks.

choices.jepang: 観光(かんこう)です。二週間(にしゅうかん)いる予定(よてい)。
choices.romaji: Kankou desu. Nishuukan iru yotei.
choices.arti: Sightseeing. Two weeks.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng appropriate keigo at customs (参りました, でございます). Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is quá suồng sã.

conversation.speaker: Nhan vien

question.jepang: お荷物(にもつ)の中(なか)に、申告(しんこく)が必要(ひつよう)なものはございますか？
question.romaji: Onimotsu no naka ni, shinkoku ga hitsuyou na mono wa gozaimasu ka?
question.arti: Are there any items that need to be declared in your luggage?

choices.jepang: はい、友人(ゆうじん)へのお土産(みやげ)として高価(こうか)な時計(とけい)を持(も)ち込(こ)んでおります。申告(しんこく)が必要(ひつよう)かどうか確認(かくにん)していただけますか？
choices.romaji: Hai, yuujin e no omiyage toshite kouka na tokei wo mochikonde orimasu. Shinkoku ga hitsuyou ka dou ka kakunin shite itadakemasu ka?
choices.arti: Yes, I'm carrying an expensive watch as a souvenir. Could you check whether it needs to be declared?

choices.jepang: いいえ、特(とく)にございません。
choices.romaji: Iie, toku ni gozaimasen.
choices.arti: No, nothing special.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cho thấy honesty and a proactive attitude. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai doesn't declare items that should be reported.

conversation.speaker: Nhan vien

question.jepang: その時計(とけい)の価格(かかく)はいくらでしょうか？免税(めんぜい)範囲(はんい)を超(こ)えている場合(ばあい)は、関税(かんぜい)を支払(しはら)っていただかなければなりません。
question.romaji: Sono tokei no kakaku wa ikura deshou ka? Menzei han'i wo koete iru baai wa, kanzei wo shiharatte itadakanakereba narimasen.
question.arti: How much is it? If it exceeds the duty-free limit, you'll need to pay customs duty.

choices.jepang: 約(やく)二十万円(にじゅうまんえん)です。免税(めんぜい)範囲(はんい)を超(こ)えているので、関税(かんぜい)を支払(しはら)わざるを得(え)ないですね。いくらになりますか？
choices.romaji: Yaku nijuumanenn desu. Menzei han'i wo koete iru node, kanzei wo shiharawa zaruwoe nai desu ne. Ikura ni narimasu ka?
choices.arti: About two hundred thousand yen. Since it exceeds the limit, I'll have to pay customs duty. How much?

choices.jepang: 安(やす)い時計(とけい)です。税金(ぜいきん)は払(はら)いたくないです。
choices.romaji: Yasui tokei desu. Zeikin wa haraitaku nai desu.
choices.arti: It's a cheap watch. I don't want to pay tax.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~ざるを得ない and cho thấy honesty. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is dishonest.
