choices.arti: Haven't started anything. I'll start next month.

choices.jepang: はい、データ収集(しゅうしゅう)を進(すす)める一方(いっぽう)で、先行(せんこう)研究(けんきゅう)のレビューもしつつあります。
choices.romaji: Hai, deeta shuushuu wo susumeru ippou de, senkou kenkyuu no rebyuu mo shi tsutsu arimasu.
choices.arti: Yes, while collecting data, I'm also conducting a literature review of previous research.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~一方で and ~つつある phù hợp. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai cho thấy negligence.

conversation.speaker: 学生

question.jepang: 先生(せんせい)、先行(せんこう)研究(けんきゅう)の結果(けっか)を踏(ふ)まえて、仮説(かせつ)を修正(しゅうせい)する必要(ひつよう)があると思(おも)うのですが。
question.romaji: Sensei, senkou kenkyuu no kekka wo fumaete, kasetsu wo shuusei suru hitsuyou ga aru to omou no desu ga.
question.arti: Sensei, based on the results of previous research, I think the hypothesis needs to be revised.

choices.jepang: そうですね。先行(せんこう)研究(けんきゅう)を踏(ふ)まえて仮説(かせつ)を見直(みなお)すのは、科学的(かがくてき)に正(ただ)しいアプローチです。具体的(ぐたいてき)にどう修正(しゅうせい)するつもりですか。
choices.romaji: Sou desu ne. Senkou kenkyuu wo fumaete kasetsu wo minaou no wa, kagakuteki ni tadashii apuroouchi desu. Gutaiteki ni dou shuusei suru tsumori desu ka.
choices.arti: I see. Revising the hypothesis based on previous research is a scientific approach. Specifically, what are your plans?

choices.jepang: 仮説(かせつ)は変(か)えないほうがいいです。そのまま進(すす)めてください。
choices.romaji: Kasetsu wa kaenai hou ga ii desu. Sono mama susumete kudasai.
choices.arti: Better not to change the hypothesis. Just continue as is.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~を踏まえて phù hợp và encourages discussion. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai obstructs the scientific process.

conversation.speaker: 教授

question.jepang: サンプル数(すう)が少(すく)ないにもかかわらず、有意(ゆうい)な結果(けっか)が得(え)られたのは興味深(きょうみぶか)いですね。
question.romaji: Sanpuru-suu ga sukunai ni mo kakawarazu, yuui na kekka ga erareta no wa kyoumibuka i desu ne.
question.arti: Although the sample size is small, it's interesting that significant results were obtained.

choices.jepang: はい、サンプル数(すう)が少(すく)ないにもかかわらず有意(ゆうい)な差(さ)が出(で)たのは、効果量(こうかりょう)が大(おお)きいからだと考(かんが)えられます。
choices.romaji: Hai, sanpuru-suu ga sukunai ni mo kakawarazu yuui na sa ga deta no wa, kouka-ryou ga ooki i kara da to kangaeraremasu.
choices.arti: Yes, perhaps because the effect size was large, significant differences emerged despite the small sample.

choices.jepang: サンプル数(すう)が多(おお)いので、結果(けっか)が良(よ)かったのだと思(おも)います。
choices.romaji: Sanpuru-suu ga ooi no de, kekka ga yokatta no da to omoimasu.
choices.arti: The results are good because the sample size is large.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~にもかかわらず phù hợp. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai hiểu sai the premise.

conversation.speaker: 学生

question.jepang: 論文(ろんぶん)の提出(ていしゅつ)締(し)め切(き)りが迫(せま)るに伴(ともな)い、ストレスが高(たか)まってきました。
question.romaji: Ronbun no teishutsu shimekiri ga semaru ni tomonai, sutoresu ga takamatte kimashita.
question.arti: As the paper submission deadline gets closer, my stress is increasing.

choices.jepang: 締(し)め切(き)りが迫(せま)れば誰(だれ)でもストレスを感(かん)じます。まず作業(さぎょう)を細(こま)かく分(わ)けて取(と)り組(く)みましょう。
choices.romaji: Shimekiri ga semereba dare demo sutoresu wo kanjimasu. Mazu sagyou wo komakaku wakete torikumimashou.
choices.arti: Everyone gets stressed when deadlines are near. First, divide the work and tackle it one by one.

choices.jepang: 締(し)め切(き)りに伴(ともな)うプレッシャーは自然(しぜん)なことです。スケジュールを立(た)て直(なお)して、優先順位(ゆうせんじゅんい)を明確(めいかく)にすることで、少(すこ)しずつ前進(ぜんしん)できますよ。
choices.romaji: Shimekiri ni tomonau puresshaa wa shizen na koto desu. Sukejuuru wo tatenao shite, yuusen junni wo meikaku ni suru koto de, sukoshi zutsu zenshin dekimasu yo.
choices.arti: The pressure that comes with deadlines is normal. By reorganizing your schedule and clarifying priorities, you can progress step by step.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に伴う phù hợp. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai doesn't use the target grammar.

conversation.speaker: 教授

question.jepang: 査読(さどく)結果(けっか)が届(とど)き次第(しだい)、修正(しゅうせい)作業(さぎょう)に取(と)りかかれるよう準備(じゅんび)しておいてください。
question.romaji: Sadoku kekka ga todoki shidai, shuusei sagyou ni torikakare you junbi shite oite kudasai.
question.arti: Once the peer review results arrive, be prepared so you can start revisions right away.

choices.jepang: かしこまりました。査読(さどく)結果(けっか)が届(とど)き次第(しだい)、すぐに対応(たいおう)できるよう準備(じゅんび)を整(ととの)えておきます。
choices.romaji: Kashikomarimashita. Sadoku kekka ga todoki shidai, sugu ni taiou dekiru you junbi wo totonoete okimasu.
choices.arti: Understood. I will prepare so I can respond immediately once the peer review arrives.

choices.jepang: 査読(さどく)結果(けっか)が来(く)るまで、何(なに)もしなくていいですね。
choices.romaji: Sadoku kekka ga kuru made, nani mo shinakute ii desu ne.
choices.arti: So until the peer review comes, I don't need to do anything?

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng understands the instructions and expresses readiness. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai hiểu sai the instructions.

conversation.speaker: 学生

question.jepang: 先生(せんせい)、このままでは締(し)め切(き)りに間(ま)に合(あ)わないかもしれません。延長(えんちょう)をお願(ねが)いせざるを得(え)ない状況(じょうきょう)です。
question.romaji: Sensei, kono mama de wa shimekiri ni maniawanai kamo shiremasen. Enchou wo o-negai sezaru wo enai joukyou desu.
question.arti: Sensei, I might not make it in time for the deadline. I have no choice but để yêu cầu an extension.

choices.jepang: 状況(じょうきょう)はわかりました。やむを得(え)ない事情(じじょう)がある場合(ばあい)は相談(そうだん)に応(おう)じます。ただし、できる限(かぎ)り自力(じりき)で解決(かいけつ)する努力(どりょく)をしてください。
choices.romaji: Joukyou wa wakarimashita. Yamu wo enai jijou ga aru baai wa soudan ni oujimasu. Tadashi, dekiru kagiri jiriki de kaiketsu suru doryoku wo shite kudasai.
choices.arti: I understand the situation. If there are unavoidable reasons, I'm willing to discuss. However, please make every effort on your own.

choices.jepang: 延長(えんちょう)は絶対(ぜったい)に認(みと)めません。なんとか頑張(がんば)ってください。
choices.romaji: Enchou wa zettai ni mitemase n. Nantoka ganbatte kudasai.
choices.arti: Extensions are not allowed. Try harder.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng đáp lại wisely using やむを得ない. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is quá cứng nhắc.

conversation.speaker: 教授

question.jepang: 研究(けんきゅう)倫理(りんり)についても注意(ちゅうい)が必要(ひつよう)です。データの改(かい)ざんや捏造(ねつぞう)は、研究者(けんきゅうしゃ)としてのキャリアを終(お)わらせかねません。
question.romaji: Kenkyuu rinri ni tsuite mo chuui ga hitsuyou desu. Deeta no kaizan ya netsuzou wa, kenkyuusha toshite no kyaria wo owarase kanemasen.
question.arti: Research ethics also need attention. Data fabrication and manipulation could end your career as a researcher.

choices.jepang: データなんて少(すこ)しくらい変(か)えても、誰(だれ)にもわかりません。
choices.romaji: Deeta nante sukoshi kurai kaete mo, dare ni mo wakarimasen.
choices.arti: If you change the data a little, no one will know.

choices.jepang: もちろんです。研究(けんきゅう)の誠実性(せいじつせい)は何(なに)よりも大切(たいせつ)だと認識(にんしき)しております。データの正確性(せいかくせい)には細心(さいしん)の注意(ちゅうい)を払(はら)ってまいります。
choices.romaji: Mochiron desu. Kenkyuu no seijitsusei wa nani yori mo taisetsu da to ninshiki shite orimasu. Deeta no seikakusei ni wa saishin no chuui wo haratte mairimasu.
choices.arti: Of course. I am well aware that research integrity is more important than anything. I will be extremely careful with data accuracy.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cho thấy ethical awareness. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is very nguy hiểm and unethical.

conversation.speaker: 学生

question.jepang: 学会(がっかい)発表(はっぴょう)の機会(きかい)が近(ちか)づいていますが、発表(はっぴょう)のコツを教(おし)えていただけますか。
question.romaji: Gakkai happyou no kikai ga chikazuite imasu ga, happyou no kotsu wo oshiete itadakemasu ka.
question.arti: The opportunity to present at a conference is approaching. Could you teach me presentation tips?

choices.jepang: 聴衆(ちょうしゅう)のレベルに合(あ)わせることが重要(じゅうよう)です。専門家(せんもんか)向(む)けの発表(はっぴょう)であるからといって、難解(なんかい)な表現(ひょうげん)ばかり使(つか)えばいいというわけではありません。わかりやすさを心(こころ)がけてください。
choices.romaji: Choushuu no reberu ni awaseru koto ga juuyou desu. Senmonka muke no happyou de aru kara to itte, nankai na hyougen bakari tsukaeba ii to iu wake de wa arimasen. Wakariyasusa wo kokorogakete kudasai.
choices.arti: It's important to adjust to the audience's level. Even though it's a presentation for experts, that doesn't mean you should always use difficult expressions. Prioritize clarity.

choices.jepang: 難(むずか)しい言葉(ことば)をたくさん使(つか)った方(ほう)が頭(あたま)が良(よ)く見(み)えます。
choices.romaji: Muzukashii kotoba wo takusan tsukatta hou ga atama ga yoku miemasu.
choices.arti: Better to use lots of difficult words to look smart.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~からといって for wise advice. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai gives bad advice.

conversation.speaker: 教授

question.jepang: 今日(きょう)の議論(ぎろん)はとても有意義(ゆういぎ)でした。研究(けんきゅう)を進(すす)める上(うえ)で何(なに)か困(こま)ったことがあれば、いつでも相談(そうだん)に来(き)てください。
question.romaji: Kyou no giron wa totemo yuuigi deshita. Kenkyuu wo susumeru ue de nanika komatta koto ga areba, itsu demo soudan ni kite kudasai.
question.arti: Today's discussion was very meaningful. If you have problems in conducting your research, come consult anytime.

choices.jepang: はい、わかりました。
choices.romaji: Hai, wakarimashita.
choices.arti: Yes, understood.

choices.jepang: ありがとうございます。先生(せんせい)のご指導(しどう)に基(もと)づいて、今後(こんご)も精進(しょうじん)してまいります。何(なに)かあれば、遠慮(えんりょ)なくご相談(そうだん)させていただきます。
choices.romaji: Arigatou gozaimasu. Sensei no go-shidou ni motozuite, kongo mo shoujin shite mairimasu. Nanika areba, enryo naku go-soudan sasete itadakimasu.
choices.arti: Thank you. Based on sensei's guidance, I will continue to work hard going forward. If anything comes up, I'll consult mà không hesitation.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に基づいて and appropriate keigo. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is quá ngắn gọn.

conversation.speaker: 学生

question.jepang: 先生(せんせい)、最後(さいご)に一(ひと)つ。研究者(けんきゅうしゃ)として成功(せいこう)するために、最(もっと)も大切(たいせつ)なことは何(なん)でしょうか。
question.romaji: Sensei, saigo ni hitotsu. Kenkyuusha toshite seikou suru tame ni, mottomo taisetsu na koto wa nan deshou ka.
question.arti: Sensei, one last thing. To succeed as a researcher, what's most important?

choices.jepang: 好奇心(こうきしん)を持(も)ち続(つづ)けることに違(ちが)いありません。失敗(しっぱい)を恐(おそ)れずに挑戦(ちょうせん)し、常(つね)に学(まな)び続(つづ)ける姿勢(しせい)が大切(たいせつ)です。そして、誠実(せいじつ)な研究(けんきゅう)を続(つづ)けることが、長期的(ちょうきてき)な成功(せいこう)につながるに違(ちが)いありません。
choices.romaji: Koukishin wo mochi tsuzukeru koto ni chigai arimasen. Shippai wo osorezu ni chousen shi, tsune ni manabi tsuzukeru shisei ga taisetsu desu. Soshite, seijitsu na kenkyuu wo tsuzukeru koto ga, choukiteki na seikou ni tsunagaru ni chigai arimasen.
choices.arti: Definitely maintaining a constant sense of curiosity. It's important to challenge mà không fearing failure and to keep learning. And continuing honest research will surely lead to long-term success.

choices.jepang: 論文(ろんぶん)をたくさん書(か)くことです。数(かず)が全(すべ)てです。
choices.romaji: Ronbun wo takusan kaku koto desu. Kazu ga subete desu.
choices.arti: Write lots of papers. Quantity is everything.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に違いない phù hợp for an inspirational message. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai oversimplifies research success.

title: Sự kiện giao lưu văn hóa

conversation.speaker: 主催者

question.jepang: 本日(ほんじつ)の文化(ぶんか)交流(こうりゅう)イベントにようこそ。グローバル化(か)が進(すす)むに伴(ともな)い、異文化(いぶんか)理解(りかい)の重要性(じゅうようせい)が増(ま)しております。
question.romaji: Honjitsu no bunka kouryu ibento ni youkoso. Guroobaruka ga susumu ni tomonai, ibunka rikai no juuyousei ga mashite orimasu.
question.arti: Welcome to the cultural exchange event. Along with globalization, tầm quan trọng của cross-cultural understanding is increasing.

choices.jepang: おっしゃる通(とお)りです。このようなイベントを通(つう)じて、互(たが)いの文化(ぶんか)を深(ふか)く理解(りかい)し合(あ)える機会(きかい)が広(ひろ)がっていくといいですね。
choices.romaji: Ossharu toori desu. Kono you na ibento wo tsuujite, tagai no bunka wo fukaku rikai shi aeru kikai ga hirogatte iku to ii desu ne.
choices.arti: Correct. I hope that through events like this, opportunities for mutual cultural understanding will expand.

choices.jepang: グローバル化(か)に伴(ともな)って、異文化(いぶんか)への理解(りかい)と尊重(そんちょう)が一層(いっそう)求(もと)められるようになりましたね。
choices.romaji: Guroobaruka ni tomonatte, ibunka e no rikai to sonchou ga issou motomerareru you ni narimashita ne.
choices.arti: Along with globalization, understanding and respect for other cultures is increasingly demanded.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng đáp lại tự nhiên và expresses positive hope. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai just repeats the point already made.

conversation.speaker: 参加者A

question.jepang: 日本(にほん)の文化(ぶんか)に興味(きょうみ)があって参加(さんか)しました。インドネシアでは日本(にほん)のアニメや料理(りょうり)が人気(にんき)になりつつあります。
question.romaji: Nihon no bunka ni kyoumi ga atte sanka shimashita. Indoneshia de wa Nihon no anime ya ryouri ga ninki ni nari tsutsu arimasu.
question.arti: I joined because I'm interested in Japanese culture. In Indonesia, anime and Japanese food are becoming more and more popular.

choices.jepang: そうなんですね！インドネシアでも日本(にほん)文化(ぶんか)が広(ひろ)まりつつあるのは嬉(うれ)しいです。逆(ぎゃく)に、インドネシアの文化(ぶんか)で最近(さいきん)日本(にほん)で注目(ちゅうもく)されているものもありますよ。
choices.romaji: Sou nan desu ne! Indoneshia de mo Nihon bunka ga hiromari tsutsu aru no wa ureshii desu. Gyaku ni, Indoneshia no bunka de saikin Nihon de chuumoku sarete iru mono mo arimasu yo.
choices.arti: Oh really! I'm glad Japanese culture is also spreading in Indonesia. Conversely, there's Indonesian culture that's getting attention in Japan too.

choices.jepang: それは全然(ぜんぜん)知(し)りませんでした。
choices.romaji: Sore wa zenzen shirimasen deshita.
choices.arti: I had no idea about that at all.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~つつある and creates warm dialogue. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai could be offensive.

conversation.speaker: 参加者B

question.jepang: 言葉(ことば)の壁(かべ)があるにもかかわらず、皆(みな)さんが笑顔(えがお)で交流(こうりゅう)されているのを見(み)て、感動(かんどう)しました。
question.romaji: Kotoba no kabe ga aru ni mo kakawarazu, mina-san ga egao de kouryu sarete iru no wo mite, kandou shimashita.
question.arti: Despite the language barrier, I was impressed seeing everyone interacting with smiles.

choices.jepang: ありがとうございます。言葉(ことば)が通(つう)じなくても、笑顔(えがお)や身振(みぶ)りで気持(きも)ちは伝(つた)わりますね。
choices.romaji: Arigatou gozaimasu. Kotoba ga tsujinakute mo, egao ya miburi de kimochi wa tsutawarimasu ne.
choices.arti: Thank you. Even when language isn't understood, feelings are still conveyed through smiles and gestures.

choices.jepang: 言葉(ことば)の壁(かべ)がないから、交流(こうりゅう)が簡単(かんたん)なんですよ。
choices.romaji: Kotoba no kabe ga nai kara, kouryu ga kantan nan desu yo.
choices.arti: Since there's no language barrier, interaction is easy.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng đáp lại wisely. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai mâu thuẫn với the facts.

conversation.speaker: 主催者

question.jepang: 文化(ぶんか)紹介(しょうかい)コーナーでは、各国(かっこく)の伝統(でんとう)を守(まも)る一方(いっぽう)で、現代的(げんだいてき)なアレンジも取(と)り入(い)れた展示(てんじ)を準備(じゅんび)しております。
question.romaji: Bunka shoukai koonaa de wa, kakkoku no dentou wo mamoru ippou de, gendaiteki na arenji mo toriire ta tenji wo junbi shite orimasu.
question.arti: At the culture introduction corner, we've prepared exhibits that maintain tradition while incorporating modern touches.

choices.jepang: 伝統(でんとう)を大切(たいせつ)にする一方(いっぽう)で、現代(げんだい)に合(あ)わせた工夫(くふう)もされているんですね。どちらも楽(たの)しめそうで楽(たの)しみです。
choices.romaji: Dentou wo taisetsu ni suru ippou de, gendai ni awaseta kufu mo sarete iru n desu ne. Dochira mo tanoshime sou de tanoshimi desu.
choices.arti: On one hand maintaining tradition, on the other hand there's modern innovation. Looks like you can enjoy both.

choices.jepang: 全(すべ)ての展示(てんじ)が昔(むかし)ながらの伝統(でんとう)スタイルで見(み)たいのですが。
choices.romaji: Subete no tenji ga mukashi nagara no dentou sutairu de mitai no desu ga.
choices.arti: I want to see all exhibits in traditional style only.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~一方で and cho thấy appreciation. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai bỏ qua the balance.

conversation.speaker: 参加者A

question.jepang: インドネシアの伝統(でんとう)舞踊(ぶよう)を紹介(しょうかい)したいのですが、踊(おど)りの意味(いみ)がうまく伝(つた)わるか不安(ふあん)です。
question.romaji: Indoneshia no dentou buyou wo shoukai shitai no desu ga, odori no imi ga umaku tsutawaru ka fuan desu.
question.arti: I want to introduce traditional Indonesian dance, but I'm worried whether the meaning will be conveyed well.

choices.jepang: 言葉(ことば)で完全(かんぜん)に伝(つた)えられなくても、踊(おど)りの美(うつく)しさや情熱(じょうねつ)は必(かなら)ず伝(つた)わるに違(ちが)いありません。簡単(かんたん)な解説(かいせつ)を添(そ)えれば、さらに理解(りかい)が深(ふか)まると思(おも)いますよ。
choices.romaji: Kotoba de kanzen ni tsutaerarenakute mo, odori no utsukushisa ya jounetsu wa kanarazu tsutawaru ni chigai arimasen. Kantan na kaisetsu wo soereba, sarani rikai ga fukamaru to omoimasu yo.
choices.arti: Even if it can't be fully conveyed through words, the beauty and spirit of the dance will surely be communicated. By adding a brief explanation, understanding will deepen further.

choices.jepang: 心配(しんぱい)しなくても、踊(おど)るだけで十分(じゅうぶん)ですよ。
choices.romaji: Shinpai shinakute mo, odoru dake de juubun desu yo.
choices.arti: Don't worry, just dancing is enough.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に違いない để đưa ra encouragement. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai xem nhẹ tầm quan trọng của cultural context.

conversation.speaker: 参加者B

question.jepang: 日本(にほん)語(ご)がまだ上手(じょうず)ではないので、うまく気持(きも)ちを伝(つた)えられないかもしれませんが、精一杯(せいいっぱい)頑張(がんば)ります。
question.romaji: Nihongo ga mada jouzu de wa nai no de, umaku kimochi wo tsutaerarenai kamo shiremasen ga, sei-ippai ganbarimasu.
question.arti: Since my Japanese isn't yet proficient, I might not be able to convey my feelings well, but I'll try my best.

choices.jepang: 日本(にほん)語(ご)が話(はな)せないなら、参加(さんか)しないほうがよかったです。
choices.romaji: Nihongo ga hanasenai nara, sanka shinai hou ga yokatta desu.
choices.arti: If you can't speak Japanese, you shouldn't participate.

choices.jepang: ご心配(しんぱい)なく！気持(きも)ちは言葉(ことば)を超(こ)えて伝(つた)わりますよ。一緒(いっしょ)に楽(たの)しみましょう。わからないことがあれば何(なん)でも聞(き)いてくださいね。
choices.romaji: Go-shinpai naku! Kimochi wa kotoba wo koete tsutawarimasu yo. Issho ni tanoshimimashou. Wakaranai koto ga areba nan demo kiite kudasai ne.
choices.arti: Don't worry! Feelings can be conveyed beyond words. Let's enjoy together. If there's anything you don't understand, just ask.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cung cấp warm and inclusive support. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai completely mâu thuẫn với the spirit of the event.

conversation.speaker: 主催者

question.jepang: 料理(りょうり)体験(たいけん)コーナーでは、日本(にほん)料理(りょうり)をはじめ、インドネシア料理(りょうり)やタイ料理(りょうり)など、各国(かっこく)の代表的(だいひょうてき)な料理(りょうり)を体験(たいけん)していただけます。
question.romaji: Ryouri taiken koonaa de wa, Nihon ryouri wo hajime, Indoneshia ryouri ya Tai ryouri nado, kakkoku no daihyouteki na ryouri wo taiken shite itadakemasu.
question.arti: At the cooking experience corner, starting with Japanese cuisine, you can try the signature dishes of various countries including Indonesia and Thailand.

choices.jepang: 素晴(すば)らしいですね！日本(にほん)料理(りょうり)をはじめ、さまざまな国(くに)の味(あじ)を一度(いちど)に楽(たの)しめるなんて、とても贅沢(ぜいたく)な機会(きかい)ですね。
choices.romaji: Subarashii desu ne! Nihon ryouri wo hajime, samazama na kuni no aji wo ichido ni tanoshimeru nante, totemo zeitaku na kikai desu ne.
choices.arti: How wonderful! Being able to enjoy dishes from various countries starting with Japan in one occasion is a truly luxurious opportunity.

choices.jepang: 日本(にほん)料理(りょうり)だけで十分(じゅうぶん)です。他(ほか)の国(くに)の料理(りょうり)には興味(きょうみ)がありません。
choices.romaji: Nihon ryouri dake de juubun desu. Hoka no kuni no ryouri ni wa kyoumi ga arimasen.
choices.arti: Japanese food alone is enough. I'm not interested in other countries' food.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~をはじめ and cho thấy enthusiasm. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai doesn't match the spirit of cultural exchange.

conversation.speaker: 参加者A

question.jepang: 今日(きょう)のイベントを通(つう)じて、日本(にほん)の友人(ゆうじん)ができました。帰国(きこく)後(ご)も連絡(れんらく)を取(と)り合(あ)いたいです。
question.romaji: Kyou no ibento wo tsuujite, Nihon no yuujin ga dekimashita. Kikoku-go mo renraku wo tori aitai desu.
question.arti: Through today's event, I made Japanese friends. I want to keep in touch even after returning home.

choices.jepang: 友達(ともだち)はすぐに忘(わす)れるものですよ。
choices.romaji: Tomodachi wa sugu ni wasureru mono desu yo.
choices.arti: Friends are quickly forgotten.

choices.jepang: 国際(こくさい)交流(こうりゅう)の素晴(すば)らしいところは、国境(こっきょう)を越(こ)えた友情(ゆうじょう)が生(う)まれることですよね。SNSやメールで簡単(かんたん)に連絡(れんらく)が取(と)れる時代(じだい)ですから、ぜひ続(つづ)けてください。
choices.romaji: Kokusai kouryu no subarashii tokoro wa, kokkyou wo koeta yuujou ga umareru koto desu yo ne. SNS ya meeru de kantan ni renraku ga toreru jidai desu kara, zehi tsuzukete kudasai.
choices.arti: The wonderful thing about international exchange is the birth of cross-border friendships. In an era where you can easily stay in contact through SNS and email, please keep nurturing that connection.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng supports cross-cultural relationships. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is very pessimistic.

conversation.speaker: 主催者

question.jepang: このイベントが終(お)わり次第(しだい)、参加者(さんかしゃ)全員(ぜんいん)にアンケートへのご協力(きょうりょく)をお願(ねが)いしたいと思(おも)います。
question.romaji: Kono ibento ga owari shidai, sanka-sha zen'in ni ankeeto e no go-kyouryoku wo o-negai shitai to omoimasu.
question.arti: Once the event is over, we ask all participants to fill out a questionnaire.

choices.jepang: イベントが終(お)わり次第(しだい)、すぐにアンケートに回答(かいとう)いたします。ぜひ次回(じかい)のイベント改善(かいぜん)に役立(やくだ)ててください。
choices.romaji: Ibento ga owari shidai, sugu ni ankeeto ni kaitou itashimasu. Zehi jikai no ibento kaizen ni yakudatete kudasai.
choices.arti: Once the event ends, I'll fill out the questionnaire right away. Please use it for improving the next event.

choices.jepang: アンケートは家(いえ)に帰(かえ)ってから、来週(らいしゅう)回答(かいとう)します。
choices.romaji: Ankeeto wa ie ni kaette kara, raishuu kaitou shimasu.
choices.arti: I'll fill it out after going home, next week.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~次第 phù hợp. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai bỏ qua the request.

conversation.speaker: 参加者B

question.jepang: 今日(きょう)は本当(ほんとう)に楽(たの)しかったです。異(こと)なる文化(ぶんか)を持(も)つ人々(ひとびと)と交流(こうりゅう)できて、視野(しや)が広(ひろ)がりました。
question.romaji: Kyou wa hontou ni tanoshikatta desu. Kotonaru bunka wo motsu hitobito to kouryu dekite, shiya ga hirogaririmashita.
question.arti: Today was really enjoyable. Being able to interact with people from different cultures broadened my horizons.

choices.jepang: こういうイベントが増(ふ)えつつある今(いま)、一人(ひとり)ひとりが異文化(いぶんか)への理解(りかい)を深(ふか)めていくことが、平和(へいわ)な社会(しゃかい)の実現(じつげん)につながるに違(ちが)いありません。また次(つぎ)の機会(きかい)にお会(あ)いしましょう。
choices.romaji: Kouiu ibento ga fue tsutsu aru ima, hitorihitori ga ibunka e no rikai wo fukamete iku koto ga, heiwa na shakai no jitsugen ni tsunagaru ni chigai arimasen. Mata tsugi no kikai ni o-ai shimashou.
choices.arti: As events like this continue to grow, each person deepening cross-cultural understanding will surely lead to the realization of a peaceful society. See you next time.

choices.jepang: はい、さようなら。
choices.romaji: Hai, sayounara.
choices.arti: Yes, see you.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~つつある and ~に違いない for a meaningful closing. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is quá ngắn gọn.

title: Thảo luận chính trị địa phương

conversation.speaker: 市議会議員

question.jepang: 人口(じんこう)減少(げんしょう)が進(すす)むに伴(ともな)い、地域(ちいき)の活性化(かっせいか)が急務(きゅうむ)となっております。
question.romaji: Jinkou genshou ga susumu ni tomonai, chiiki no kasseika ga kyuumu to natte orimasu.
question.arti: Along with population decline, regional revitalization has become an urgent matter.

choices.jepang: 人口(じんこう)が増(ふ)えているので、特(とく)に問題(もんだい)はないと思(おも)います。
choices.romaji: Jinkou ga fuete iru no de, toku ni mondai wa nai to omoimasu.
choices.arti: The population is increasing, so there's no problem.

choices.jepang: 人口(じんこう)減少(げんしょう)に伴(ともな)う課題(かだい)に対応(たいおう)するため、若者(わかもの)が住(す)みやすい環境(かんきょう)づくりが必要(ひつよう)ではないでしょうか。
choices.romaji: Jinkou genshou ni tomonau kadai ni taiou suru tame, wakamono ga sumiyasui kankyou-zukuri ga hitsuyou de wa nai deshou ka.
choices.arti: To address the challenges of population decline, isn't it necessary to create an environment where young people feel comfortable living?

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に伴う phù hợp. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai mâu thuẫn với the facts.

conversation.speaker: 住民代表

question.jepang: 前回(ぜんかい)の選挙(せんきょ)の結果(けっか)を踏(ふ)まえて、今回(こんかい)の政策(せいさく)はどのように変(か)わるのでしょうか。
question.romaji: Zenkai no senkyo no kekka wo fumaete, konkai no seisaku wa dono you ni kawaru no deshou ka.
question.arti: Based on the results of the previous election, how will policies change this time?

choices.jepang: 前回(ぜんかい)の選挙(せんきょ)結果(けっか)を踏(ふ)まえ、有権者(ゆうけんしゃ)の声(こえ)を反映(はんえい)した政策(せいさく)に転換(てんかん)する予定(よてい)です。
choices.romaji: Zenkai no senkyo kekka wo fumaete, yuukensha no koe wo han'ei shita seisaku ni tenkan suru yotei desu.
choices.arti: Based on the election results, we plan to shift to policies that reflect voters' voices.

choices.jepang: 前回(ぜんかい)の結果(けっか)を踏(ふ)まえて、特(とく)に教育(きょういく)と福祉(ふくし)の分野(ぶんや)での改善(かいぜん)を優先(ゆうせん)する方向(ほうこう)で検討(けんとう)しております。
choices.romaji: Zenkai no kekka wo fumaete, toku ni kyouiku to fukushi no bunya de no kaizen wo yuusen suru houkou de kentou shite orimasu.
choices.arti: Based on the previous results, we are considering a direction that prioritizes improvements in education and welfare.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng is more specific in mentioning prioritized areas. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is too general.

conversation.speaker: 住民

question.jepang: 新(あたら)しい開発(かいはつ)計画(けいかく)に対(たい)する住民(じゅうみん)の反対(はんたい)意見(いけん)が多(おお)いにもかかわらず、なぜ強行(きょうこう)しようとするのですか。
question.romaji: Atarashii kaihatsu keikaku ni taisuru juumin no hantai iken ga ooi ni mo kakawarazu, naze kyoukou shiyou to suru no desu ka.
question.arti: Despite many residents opposing the new development plan, why is it being pushed forward?

choices.jepang: 住民(じゅうみん)の意見(いけん)など関係(かんけい)ありません。計画(けいかく)は予定(よてい)通(とお)り進(すす)めます。
choices.romaji: Juumin no iken nado kankei arimasen. Keikaku wa yotei doori susumemasu.
choices.arti: Residents' opinions are irrelevant. The plan continues as scheduled.

choices.jepang: 反対(はんたい)意見(いけん)が多(おお)いにもかかわらず推進(すいしん)しようとしているように見(み)える点(てん)は、真摯(しんし)に受(う)け止(と)めております。住民(じゅうみん)説明会(せつめいかい)を改(あらた)めて開催(かいさい)したいと思(おも)います。
choices.romaji: Hantai iken ga ooi ni mo kakawarazu suishin shiyou to shite iru you ni mieru ten wa, shinshi ni ukete orimasu. Juumin setsumeikai wo aratamete kaisai shitai to omoimasu.
choices.arti: We take seriously the criticism that it appears we're pushing forward despite much opposition. We would like to hold explanation sessions again.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng thừa nhận objections và đưa ra dialogue. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai bỏ qua the people's voice.

conversation.speaker: 市長

question.jepang: 財政(ざいせい)を健全化(けんぜんか)する一方(いっぽう)で、市民(しみん)サービスの質(しつ)を落(お)とさないことが私(わたし)の公約(こうやく)です。
question.romaji: Zaisei wo kenzenka suru ippou de, shimin saabisu no shitsu wo otosanai koto ga watashi no kouyaku desu.
question.arti: Improving fiscal health while not lowering the quality of public services is my campaign promise.

choices.jepang: 財政(ざいせい)健全化(けんぜんか)と市民(しみん)サービスの維持(いじ)を両立(りょうりつ)させる一方(いっぽう)で、新(あら)たな収入源(しゅうにゅうげん)の開拓(かいたく)も必要(ひつよう)ではないでしょうか。
choices.romaji: Zaisei kenzenka to shimin saabisu no iji wo ryouritsu saseru ippou de, aratana shuunyuugen no kaitaku mo hitsuyou de wa nai deshou ka.
choices.arti: While balancing fiscal health and public services, isn't it also necessary to develop new revenue sources?

choices.jepang: 財政(ざいせい)が良(よ)くなれば、市民(しみん)サービスも自然(しぜん)に良(よ)くなります。
choices.romaji: Zaisei ga yoku nareba, shimin saabisu mo shizen ni yoku narimasu.
choices.arti: If finances improve, public services automatically improve too.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~一方で and adds a new perspective. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai oversimplifies.

conversation.speaker: 記者

question.jepang: 市長(しちょう)、増税(ぞうぜい)を回避(かいひ)するためには、予算(よさん)を大幅(おおはば)に削減(さくげん)せざるを得(え)ないと思(おも)いますが。
question.romaji: Shichou, zouzei wo kaihi suru tame ni wa, yosan wo oohaba ni sakugen sezaru wo enai to omoimasu ga.
question.arti: Mr. Mayor, to avoid a tax increase, I believe significant budget cuts are necessary.

choices.jepang: おっしゃる通(とお)り、増税(ぞうぜい)を避(さ)けるためには、ある程度(ていど)の歳出(さいしゅつ)削減(さくげん)はせざるを得(え)ないと考(かんが)えております。ただし、生活(せいかつ)に直結(ちょっけつ)するサービスは守(まも)るつもりです。
choices.romaji: Ossharu toori, zouzei wo sakeru tame ni wa, aru teido no saishutsu sakugen wa sezaru wo enai to kangaete orimasu. Tadashi, seikatsu ni chokketu suru saabisu wa mamoru tsumori desu.
choices.arti: Correct, to avoid a tax increase, spending cuts are unavoidable. However, I intend to maintain services directly related to residents' daily lives.

choices.jepang: 増税(ぞうぜい)せざるを得(え)ない状況(じょうきょう)を作(つく)ったのは前(まえ)の市長(しちょう)のせいです。
choices.romaji: Zouzei sezaru wo enai joukyou wo tsukutta no wa mae no shichou no sei desu.
choices.arti: The situation of having to raise taxes is the previous mayor's fault.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng honestly thừa nhận reality. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai just blames others.

conversation.speaker: 若者有権者

question.jepang: 政治(せいじ)への無関心(むかんしん)が続(つづ)けば、若者(わかもの)の声(こえ)が政策(せいさく)に反映(はんえい)されなくなりかねないと思(おも)います。
question.romaji: Seiji e no mukanshin ga tsuzukeba, wakamono no koe ga seisaku ni han'ei sarenaku nari kanenai to omoimasu.
question.arti: If political apathy continues, the voices of young people might not be reflected in policies.

choices.jepang: おっしゃる通(とお)りです。若者(わかもの)が政治(せいじ)から離(はな)れれば離(はな)れるほど、高齢者(こうれいしゃ)向(む)けの政策(せいさく)に偏(かたよ)りがちになりかねないですね。投票率(とうひょうりつ)向上(こうじょう)のための働(はたら)きかけが必要(ひつよう)だと思(おも)います。
choices.romaji: Ossharu toori desu. Wakamono ga seiji kara hanarere ba hanareru hodo, koureisha muke no seisaku ni katayori gachi ni nari kanenai desu ne. Touhyou-ritsu koujou no tame no hataraki-kake ga hitsuyou da to omoimasu.
choices.arti: Correct. The more young people distance themselves from politics, the more policies tend to favor the elderly. Efforts to increase voter turnout are needed.

choices.jepang: その通(とお)りですね。政治(せいじ)への参加(さんか)を怠(おこた)れば、若者(わかもの)に不利(ふり)な政策(せいさく)ばかりになりかねないので、積極的(せっきょくてき)な参加(さんか)が大切(たいせつ)です。
choices.romaji: Sono toori desu ne. Seiji e no sanka wo okotareba, wakamono ni furi na seisaku bakari ni nari kanenai no de, sekkyokuteki na sanka ga taisetsu desu.
choices.arti: Correct. Because if political participation is neglected, policies disadvantaging young people might keep emerging.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cung cấp deeper analysis and mentions specific solutions. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai lacks depth.

conversation.speaker: 市議会議員

question.jepang: 地方(ちほう)創生(そうせい)のためには、地元(じもと)の中小企業(ちゅうしょうきぎょう)を支援(しえん)しないわけにはいきません。雇用(こよう)を創出(そうしゅつ)することが地域(ちいき)の活力(かつりょく)の源(みなもと)です。
question.romaji: Chihou sousei no tame ni wa, jimoto no chuushou kigyou wo shien shinai wake ni wa ikimasen. Koyou wo soushutsu suru koto ga chiiki no katsuryoku no minamoto desu.
question.arti: For regional revitalization, there's no choice but to support local SMEs. Creating jobs is the source of regional vitality.

choices.jepang: おっしゃる通(とお)りです。中小企業(ちゅうしょうきぎょう)への支援(しえん)に加(くわ)えて、起業(きぎょう)しやすい環境(かんきょう)づくりも重要(じゅうよう)ではないでしょうか。若者(わかもの)が地元(じもと)で挑戦(ちょうせん)できる仕組(しく)みが必要(ひつよう)です。
choices.romaji: Ossharu toori desu. Chuushou kigyou e no shien ni kuwaete, kigyou shiyasui kankyou-zukuri mo juuyou de wa nai deshou ka. Wakamono ga jimoto de chousen dekiru shikumi ga hitsuyou desu.
choices.arti: Correct. Besides supporting SMEs, isn't it also important to create an environment that makes it easy to start a business? A system is needed so young people can take on challenges in their hometowns.

choices.jepang: 中小企業(ちゅうしょうきぎょう)よりも、大企業(だいきぎょう)を誘致(ゆうち)した方(ほう)が早(はや)いです。
choices.romaji: Chuushou kigyou yori mo, daikigyo wo yuuchi shita hou ga hayai desu.
choices.arti: Attracting large companies is faster than supporting SMEs.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng adds a new mang tính xây dựng perspective. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai bỏ qua the role of local SMEs.

conversation.speaker: 住民代表

question.jepang: 防災(ぼうさい)対策(たいさく)の予算(よさん)が削減(さくげん)されたと聞(き)きましたが、災害(さいがい)が増(ふ)えつつある今(いま)、それは危険(きけん)ではないですか。
question.romaji: Bousai taisaku no yosan ga sakugen sareta to kikimashita ga, saigai ga fue tsutsu aru ima, sore wa kiken de wa nai desu ka.
question.arti: I heard the disaster prevention budget was cut. As disasters continue to increase, isn't that nguy hiểm?

choices.jepang: 予算(よさん)は十分(じゅうぶん)あります。心配(しんぱい)しないでください。
choices.romaji: Yosan wa juubun arimasu. Shinpai shinaide kudasai.
choices.arti: The budget is sufficient. Don't worry.

conversation.speaker: 田中(たなか)取締役(とりしまりやく)

conversation.speaker: 山田(やまだ)社長(しゃちょう)

title: Tư vấn thuế

conversation.speaker: 中村(なかむら)税理士(ぜいりし)

choices.jepang: はい。会社員(かいしゃいん)としての給与(きゅうよ)所得(しょとく)に加(くわ)え、副業(ふくぎょう)として行(おこな)っているフリーランスの収入(しゅうにゅう)もございます。副業(ふくぎょう)の収入(しゅうにゅう)が増(ふ)えたことに伴(ともな)い、申告(しんこく)方法(ほうほう)を確認(かくにん)したく参(まい)りました。

conversation.speaker: 中村(なかむら)税理士(ぜいりし)

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~にかかわる and ~に至るまで để cho thấy thorough and organized tax document management. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai cho thấy serious negligence in keeping expense records.

conversation.speaker: 相談者(そうだんしゃ)

question.jepang: 経費(けいひ)として認(みと)められる範囲(はんい)について教(おし)えていただけますか。自宅(じたく)で仕事(しごと)をしているので、家賃(やちん)の一部(いちぶ)も経費(けいひ)にできると聞(き)いたのですが。
question.romaji: Keihi to shite mitomerareru han'i ni tsuite oshiete itadakemasu ka. Jitaku de shigoto wo shite iru node, yachin no ichibu mo keihi ni dekiru to kiita no desu ga.
question.arti: Could you explain about the scope recognized as business expenses? Since I work from home, I heard a portion of rent can also be counted as an expense.

choices.jepang: おっしゃる通(とお)りです。実際(じっさい)の使用(しよう)状況(じょうきょう)に即(そく)して、業務(ぎょうむ)で使用(しよう)している面積(めんせき)の割合(わりあい)に応(おう)じて、家賃(やちん)の一部(いちぶ)を経費(けいひ)として計上(けいじょう)できます。光熱費(こうねつひ)も同様(どうよう)です。
choices.romaji: Ossharu toori desu. Jissai no shiyou joukyou ni sokushite, gyoumu de shiyou shite iru menseki no wariai ni oujite, yachin no ichibu wo keihi to shite keijou dekimasu. Kounetsuhi mo douyou desu.
choices.arti: Exactly as you say. According to the actual usage conditions, based on the proportion of floor space used for work, a portion of rent can be recorded as an expense. Utility costs are the same.

choices.jepang: 家賃(やちん)は全額(ぜんがく)経費(けいひ)にできますよ。心配(しんぱい)いりません。
choices.romaji: Yachin wa zengaku keihi ni dekimasu yo. Shinpai irimasen.
choices.arti: The entire rent can be counted as an expense. Don't worry.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に即して and ~に応じて để giải thích that expense recognition must be according to actual conditions and proportional. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai cung cấp incorrect information because not all rent can be counted as an expense.

conversation.speaker: 相談者(そうだんしゃ)

question.jepang: ふるさと納税(のうぜい)についても伺(うかが)いたいのですが、節税(せつぜい)効果(こうか)はどの程度(ていど)あるのでしょうか。
question.romaji: Furusato nouzei ni tsuite mo ukagaitai no desu ga, setsuzei kouka wa dono teido aru no deshou ka.
question.arti: I'd also like để hỏi about the hometown tax (furusato nouzei). How much tax savings does it provide?

choices.jepang: ふるさと納税(のうぜい)は税金(ぜいきん)がゼロになる制度(せいど)です。
choices.romaji: Furusato nouzei wa zeikin ga zero ni naru seido desu.
choices.arti: Furusato nouzei is a system that makes your tax zero.

choices.jepang: ふるさと納税(のうぜい)は、年収(ねんしゅう)に応(おう)じた上限額(じょうげんがく)の範囲内(はんいない)で寄付(きふ)を行(おこな)えば、翌年(よくねん)の住民税(じゅうみんぜい)から控除(こうじょ)されます。ただし、節税(せつぜい)というよりは税(ぜい)の前払(まえばら)いに近(ちか)い仕組(しく)みですので、その点(てん)はご留意(りゅうい)ください。
choices.romaji: Furusato nouzei wa, nenshuu ni oujita jougengaku no han'i nai de kifu wo okonaeba, yokumen no juuminzei kara koujo saremasu. Tadashi, setsuzei to iu yori wa zei no maebarai ni chikai shikumi desu node, sono ten wa go-ryuui kudasai.
choices.arti: Furusato nouzei, if you donate within the upper limit corresponding to your annual income, will be deducted from next year's resident tax. However, it's more accurately described as advance tax payment rather than tax savings, so please note that.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に応じた to accurately explain the donation limit according to income. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai cung cấp incorrect information about furusato nouzei.

conversation.speaker: 中村(なかむら)税理士(ぜいりし)

question.jepang: 住宅(じゅうたく)ローン控除(こうじょ)についてもご質問(しつもん)があるとのことですが、現在(げんざい)の状況(じょうきょう)をお聞(き)かせください。

question.arti: I heard you also have questions about the housing loan deduction. Please tell me your current situation.

choices.jepang: 昨年(さくねん)マンションを購入(こうにゅう)しました。税制(ぜいせい)改正(かいせい)に基(もと)づいて控除額(こうじょがく)が変(か)わったと聞(き)いたのですが、具体的(ぐたいてき)にどのような影響(えいきょう)があるのか教(おし)えていただけますか。
choices.romaji: Sakunen manshon wo kounyuu shimashita. Zeisei kaisei ni motozuite koujogaku ga kawatta to kiita no desu ga, gutaiteki ni dono you na eikyou ga aru no ka oshiete itadakemasu ka.
choices.arti: I bought an apartment last year. I heard that based on tax reform, the deduction amount has changed. Could you explain the concrete impact?

choices.jepang: 家(いえ)を買(か)ったんですが、ローン控除(こうじょ)って何(なん)ですか。全然(ぜんぜん)知(し)りません。
choices.romaji: Ie wo kattan desu ga, roon koujo tte nan desu ka. Zenzen shirimasen.
choices.arti: I bought a house, but what is a loan deduction? I have no idea.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に基づいて to reference changes in tax rules as the basis for a specific question. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai cho thấy basic ignorance that should have been understood before the consultation.

conversation.speaker: 中村(なかむら)税理士(ぜいりし)

question.jepang: 医療費(いりょうひ)控除(こうじょ)についてもご説明(せつめい)いたします。年間(ねんかん)の医療費(いりょうひ)が10万円(まんえん)を超(こ)えた場合(ばあい)、確定(かくてい)申告(しんこく)で控除(こうじょ)を受(う)けることができます。
question.romaji: Iryouhi koujo ni tsuite mo go-setsumei itashimasu. Nenkan no iryouhi ga juu man en wo koeta baai, kakutei shinkoku de koujo wo ukeru koto ga dekimasu.
question.arti: I'll also explain about the medical expense deduction. If annual medical expenses exceed 100,000 yen, you can receive a deduction through tax filing.

choices.jepang: 病院(びょういん)には行(い)かないので関係(かんけい)ありません。
choices.romaji: Byouin ni wa ikanai node kankei arimasen.
choices.arti: I don't go to the hospital so it's irrelevant.

choices.jepang: 昨年(さくねん)は歯科(しか)治療(ちりょう)に費用(ひよう)がかかりましたので、該当(がいとう)するかもしれません。医療費(いりょうひ)の領収書(りょうしゅうしょ)は全(すべ)て保管(ほかん)しております。交通費(こうつうひ)も対象(たいしょう)になると聞(き)いたのですが。
choices.romaji: Sakunen wa shika chiryou ni hiyou ga kakarimashita node, gaitou suru kamo shiremasen. Iryouhi no ryoushuusho wa subete hokan shite orimasu. Koutsuuhi mo taishou ni naru to kiita no desu ga.
choices.arti: Last year my dental treatment costs were quite high, so it might qualify. I've kept all medical expense receipts. I heard transportation costs are also included.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cho thấy document preparedness and understanding of the medical deduction scope. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai immediately closes the possibility mà không considering other medical costs.

conversation.speaker: 相談者(そうだんしゃ)

question.jepang: 来年(らいねん)から青色(あおいろ)申告(しんこく)に切(き)り替(か)えたいと考(かんが)えていますが、白色(しろいろ)申告(しんこく)との違(ちが)いを教(おし)えていただけますか。
question.romaji: Rainen kara aoiro shinkoku ni kirikaetai to kangaete imasu ga, shiroiro shinkoku to no chigai wo oshiete itadakemasu ka.
question.arti: Starting next year, I'd like to switch to blue filing (aoiro shinkoku). Could you explain the difference from white filing?

choices.jepang: 青色(あおいろ)申告(しんこく)は、複式(ふくしき)簿記(ぼき)による帳簿(ちょうぼ)の作成(さくせい)を余儀(よぎ)なくされますが、最大(さいだい)65万円(まんえん)の特別(とくべつ)控除(こうじょ)が受(う)けられるなど、節税(せつぜい)面(めん)でのメリットが大(おお)きいです。
choices.romaji: Aoiro shinkoku wa, fukushiki boki ni yoru choubo no sakusei wo yoginaku saremasu ga, saidai rokujuugo man en no tokubetsu koujo ga ukerareru nado, setsuzei men de no meritto ga ookii desu.
choices.arti: Blue filing requires bookkeeping with double-entry accounting, but there's a significant tax savings advantage such as a special deduction of up to 650,000 yen.

choices.jepang: 色(いろ)が違(ちが)うだけで、中身(なかみ)は同(おな)じですよ。
choices.romaji: Iro ga chigau dake de, nakami wa onaji desu yo.
choices.arti: It's just a color difference. The content is the same.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~を余儀なくされる để giải thích the double-entry bookkeeping requirement as a consequence of choosing blue filing, đồng thời cũng mentioning the advantages. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai cung cấp clearly incorrect information.

conversation.speaker: 中村(なかむら)税理士(ぜいりし)

question.jepang: 電子(でんし)申告(しんこく)（e-Tax）をご利用(りよう)になることをお勧(すす)めします。税務署(ぜいむしょ)に行(い)かずに申告(しんこく)が完了(かんりょう)できますし、還付(かんぷ)も早(はや)くなります。
question.romaji: Denshi shinkoku (e-Tax) wo go-riyou ni naru koto wo osusume shimasu. Zeimusho ni ikazu ni shinkoku ga kanryou dekimasu shi, kanpu mo hayaku narimasu.
question.arti: I recommend using electronic filing (e-Tax). You can complete your filing mà không going to the tax office, and refunds are also faster.

choices.jepang: パソコンは使(つか)えないので、紙(かみ)でしかできません。
choices.romaji: Pasokon wa tsukaenai node, kami de shika dekimasen.
choices.arti: I can't use a computer, so I can only use paper.

choices.romaji: e-Tax no riyou ni sakidachi, mainanbaa kaado no shutoku ga hitsuyou deshou ka. Sude ni kaado wa motte orimasu ga, riyousha shikibetsu bangou no settei ga mada sunde orimasen.
choices.arti: Prior to using e-Tax, is it necessary to obtain a My Number card? I already have the card, but the user identification number setup isn't complete yet.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に先立ち để hỏi about preparation needed before using e-Tax, thể hiện readiness. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai immediately refuses mà không trying to find a solution.

conversation.speaker: 相談者(そうだんしゃ)

question.jepang: 将来的(しょうらいてき)に法人化(ほうじんか)も視野(しや)に入(い)れているのですが、個人(こじん)事業主(じぎょうぬし)との税制上(ぜいせいじょう)の違(ちが)いについても伺(うかが)えますか。
question.romaji: Shouraiteki ni houjinka mo shiya ni irete iru no desu ga, kojin jigyounushi to no zeiseijou no chigai ni tsuite mo ukagaemasu ka.
question.arti: In the future, I'm also considering incorporating. Could I ask about the tax differences from being a sole proprietor?

choices.jepang: 法人化(ほうじんか)するかどうかにかかわらず、まずは現在(げんざい)の事業(じぎょう)規模(きぼ)と将来(しょうらい)の成長(せいちょう)見込(みこ)みを踏(ふ)まえた上(うえ)で判断(はんだん)されるのがよいかと思(おも)います。一般的(いっぱんてき)に、所得(しょとく)が800万円(まんえん)を超(こ)えると法人(ほうじん)の方(ほう)が税率(ぜいりつ)面(めん)で有利(ゆうり)になる傾向(けいこう)がございます。
choices.romaji: Houjinka suru ka dou ka ni kakawarazu, mazu wa genzai no jigyou kibo to shourai no seichou mikomi wo fumaeta ue de handan sareru no ga yoi ka to omoimasu. Ippanteki ni, shotoku ga happyaku man en wo koeru to houjin no hou ga zeiritsu men de yuuri ni naru keikou ga gozaimasu.
choices.arti: Regardless of whether you incorporate or not, you should first make a decision based on your current business scale and future growth prospects. Generally, if income exceeds 8 million yen, incorporation tends to be more advantageous from a tax rate perspective.

choices.jepang: 法人化(ほうじんか)は面倒(めんどう)なのでやめた方(ほう)がいいですよ。
choices.romaji: Houjinka wa mendou na node yameta hou ga ii desu yo.
choices.arti: Incorporating is troublesome. Better not to.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~にかかわらず and ~を踏まえた để cung cấp objective advice based on toàn diện consideration. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai gives a subjective opinion mà không chuyên nghiệp basis.

conversation.speaker: 中村(なかむら)税理士(ぜいりし)

question.jepang: それでは、本日(ほんじつ)の相談(そうだん)内容(ないよう)を踏(ふ)まえて、申告書(しんこくしょ)の作成(さくせい)に取(と)りかかりましょう。必要(ひつよう)書類(しょるい)を全(すべ)てお持(も)ちいただいたので、スムーズに進(すす)められるかと思(おも)います。
question.romaji: Sore dewa, honjitsu no soudan naiyou wo fumaete, shinkokusho no sakusei ni torikakarimashoo. Hitsuyou shorui wo subete omochi itadaita node, sumuuzu ni susumerareru ka to omoimasu.
question.arti: Well then, based on today's consultation, let's begin preparing the tax return documents. Since all necessary documents are brought, I think the process will go smoothly.

choices.jepang: 全部(ぜんぶ)お任(まか)せします。私(わたし)は何(なに)もしなくていいですよね。
choices.romaji: Zenbu omakase shimasu. Watashi wa nani mo shinakute ii desu yo ne.
choices.arti: Leave everything to you. I don't need to do anything, right?

choices.jepang: ありがとうございます。不明(ふめい)な点(てん)があれば随時(ずいじ)ご質問(しつもん)させていただきます。来年(らいねん)の青色(あおいろ)申告(しんこく)への切(き)り替(か)えに関(かん)しても、改(あらた)めてご相談(そうだん)させてください。
choices.romaji: Arigatou gozaimasu. Fumei na ten ga areba zuiji go-shitsumon sasete itadakimasu. Rainen no aoiro shinkoku e no kirikae ni kanshite mo, aratamete go-soudan sasete kudasai.
choices.arti: Thank you. If anything is unclear, I'll ask along the way. Regarding the switch to blue filing next year, please let me consult again.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cho thấy an active attitude and follow-up plan for the next tax consultation. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is quá thụ động and hands off all responsibility.

title: Tư vấn phẫu thuật

conversation.speaker: 高橋(たかはし)医師(いし)

question.jepang: 検査(けんさ)結果(けっか)に基(もと)づいて、手術(しゅじゅつ)の必要性(ひつようせい)についてご説明(せつめい)いたします。膝(ひざ)の軟骨(なんこつ)がかなり損傷(そんしょう)しており、保存(ほぞん)療法(りょうほう)では改善(かいぜん)が見込(みこ)めない状況(じょうきょう)です。
question.romaji: Kensa kekka ni motozuite, shujutsu no hitsuyousei ni tsuite go-setsumei itashimasu. Hiza no nankotsu ga kanari sonshou shite ori, hozon ryouhou de wa kaizen ga mikomenai joukyou desu.
question.arti: Based on the examination results, I will explain the need for surgery. Your knee cartilage is considerably damaged, and improvement cannot be expected with conservative therapy.

choices.jepang: 手術(しゅじゅつ)は怖(こわ)いので絶対(ぜったい)にしたくありません。薬(くすり)だけでなんとかなりませんか。
choices.romaji: Shujutsu wa kowai node zettai ni shitaku arimasen. Kusuri dake de nantoka narimasen ka.
choices.arti: Surgery is scary so I absolutely don't want it. Can't it be treated with just medication?

choices.jepang: 保存(ほぞん)療法(りょうほう)では改善(かいぜん)が見込(みこ)めないとのことですので、手術(しゅじゅつ)を前向(まえむ)きに検討(けんとう)したいと思(おも)います。手術(しゅじゅつ)の種類(しゅるい)や方法(ほうほう)について詳(くわ)しく教(おし)えていただけますか。
choices.romaji: Hozon ryouhou de wa kaizen ga mikomenai to no koto desu node, shujutsu wo maemuki ni kentou shitai to omoimasu. Shujutsu no shurui ya houhou ni tsuite kuwashiku oshiete itadakemasu ka.
choices.arti: Since improvement cannot be expected with conservative therapy, I'd like to positively consider surgery. Could you explain in detail about the type and method of surgery?

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng đáp lại mang tính xây dựngly to the doctor's recommendation and requests further information. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai rejects medical advice mà không considering alternatives.

conversation.speaker: 高橋(たかはし)医師(いし)

question.jepang: 手術(しゅじゅつ)に先立(さきだ)ち、いくつかの追加(ついか)検査(けんさ)を行(おこな)う必要(ひつよう)がございます。血液(けつえき)検査(けんさ)、心電図(しんでんず)、レントゲンなどです。手術(しゅじゅつ)の方法(ほうほう)としては、関節(かんせつ)鏡(きょう)手術(しゅじゅつ)を推奨(すいしょう)いたします。
question.romaji: Shujutsu ni sakidachi, ikutsuka no tsuika kensa wo okonau hitsuyou ga gozaimasu. Ketsueki kensa, shindenzu, rentogen nado desu. Shujutsu no houhou to shite wa, kansetsukyou shujutsu wo suishou itashimasu.
question.arti: Prior to surgery, several additional examinations need to be done, such as blood tests, ECG, and X-rays. As the surgical method, I recommend arthroscopic surgery.

choices.jepang: 関節(かんせつ)鏡(きょう)手術(しゅじゅつ)というのは、従来(じゅうらい)の手術(しゅじゅつ)と比(くら)べてどのようなメリットがあるのでしょうか。入院(にゅういん)期間(きかん)や回復(かいふく)に至(いた)るまでの見通(みとお)しも教(おし)えていただけますか。
choices.romaji: Kansetsukyou shujutsu to iu no wa, juurai no shujutsu to kurabete dono you na meritto ga aru no deshou ka. Nyuuin kikan ya kaifuku ni itaru made no mitooshi mo oshiete itadakemasu ka.
choices.arti: Compared to conventional surgery, what are the advantages of arthroscopic surgery? Could you also explain the outlook from hospitalization through recovery?

choices.jepang: 検査(けんさ)は面倒(めんどう)なのでしたくないです。すぐに手術(しゅじゅつ)してください。
choices.romaji: Kensa wa mendou na node shitaku nai desu. Sugu ni shujutsu shite kudasai.
choices.arti: Examinations are troublesome so I don't want them. Please just do the surgery directly.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に至るまで để hỏi about the process from hospitalization through recovery toàn diệnly. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai refuses important pre-operative examinations essential for patient safety.

conversation.speaker: 高橋(たかはし)医師(いし)

question.jepang: 関節(かんせつ)鏡(きょう)手術(しゅじゅつ)は傷口(きずぐち)が小(ちい)さいため、回復(かいふく)が早(はや)いのが特徴(とくちょう)です。ただし、手術(しゅじゅつ)にはリスクも伴(ともな)います。感染症(かんせんしょう)や血栓(けっせん)などの合併症(がっぺいしょう)が起(お)こりかねませんので、事前(じぜん)にご理解(りかい)いただきたいです。
question.romaji: Kansetsukyou shujutsu wa kizuguchi ga chiisai tame, kaifuku ga hayai no ga tokuchou desu. Tadashi, shujutsu ni wa risuku mo tomonaimasu. Kansenshou ya kessen nado no gappeishou ga okorikane masen node, jizen ni go-rikai itadakitai desu.
question.arti: Arthroscopic surgery is characterized by faster recovery due to the small incision. However, surgery also carries risks. Complications such as infection and thrombosis could occur, so I'd like you to understand this beforehand.

choices.jepang: 合併症(がっぺいしょう)なんて起(お)きるわけないと思(おも)います。気(き)にしません。
choices.romaji: Gappeishou nante okiru wake nai to omoimasu. Ki ni shimasen.
choices.arti: Complications can't possibly happen. I don't care.

choices.jepang: リスクがあることは理解(りかい)しました。合併症(がっぺいしょう)の発生率(はっせいりつ)はどの程度(ていど)でしょうか。また、リスクを最小限(さいしょうげん)に抑(おさ)えるために、手術(しゅじゅつ)前(まえ)に何(なに)か注意(ちゅうい)すべき点(てん)はございますか。
choices.romaji: Risuku ga aru koto wa rikai shimashita. Gappeishou no hasseiritsu wa dono teido deshou ka. Mata, risuku wo saishōgen ni osaeru tame ni, shujutsu mae ni nanika chuui subeki ten wa gozaimasu ka.
choices.arti: I understand there are risks. What is the complication rate? And to minimize risks, are there things to be careful about before surgery?

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cho thấy understanding of risks and proactively requests preventive information. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai bỏ qua an important medical warning from the doctor.

conversation.speaker: 患者(かんじゃ)

question.jepang: 麻酔(ますい)の方法(ほうほう)についても伺(うかが)いたいのですが、全身(ぜんしん)麻酔(ますい)と局所(きょくしょ)麻酔(ますい)のどちらになりますか。
question.romaji: Masui no houhou ni tsuite mo ukagaitai no desu ga, zenshin masui to kyokusho masui no dochira ni narimasu ka.
question.arti: I'd also like để hỏi about the anesthesia method. Will it be general anesthesia or local anesthesia?

choices.jepang: 患者(かんじゃ)様(さま)の状態(じょうたい)に応(おう)じて判断(はんだん)いたしますが、今回(こんかい)のケースでは脊椎(せきつい)麻酔(ますい)を推奨(すいしょう)しております。手術(しゅじゅつ)中(ちゅう)は意識(いしき)がございますが、痛(いた)みは全(まった)く感(かん)じません。麻酔科(ますいか)の専門医(せんもんい)と連携(れんけい)して対応(たいおう)いたします。
choices.romaji: Kanjasama no joutai ni oujite handan itashimasu ga, konkai no keesu de wa sekitsui masui wo suishou shite orimasu. Shujutsuchuu wa ishiki ga gozaimasu ga, itami wa mattaku kanjimasen. Masuika no senmon'i to renkei shite taiou itashimasu.
choices.arti: We will decide according to the patient's condition, but for this case we recommend spinal anesthesia. You'll be conscious during surgery but won't feel any pain at all. We will coordinate with the anesthesiologist.

choices.jepang: どちらでもいいですよ。当日(とうじつ)決(き)めましょう。
choices.romaji: Dochira demo ii desu yo. Toujitsu kimemashoo.
choices.arti: Either is fine. Just decide on the day.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に応じて để giải thích that the anesthesia decision is adapted to the patient's condition. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai cho thấy an không chuyên nghiệp doctor attitude.

conversation.speaker: 高橋(たかはし)医師(いし)

question.jepang: 手術(しゅじゅつ)の日程(にってい)ですが、来月(らいげつ)の第(だい)二(に)週(しゅう)を予定(よてい)しております。手術(しゅじゅつ)に先立(さきだ)ち、二週間前(にしゅうかんまえ)に術前(じゅつぜん)検査(けんさ)を行(おこな)います。その間(あいだ)、血液(けつえき)をサラサラにする薬(くすり)は服用(ふくよう)を中止(ちゅうし)せざるを得(え)ません。
question.romaji: Shujutsu no nittei desu ga, raigetsu no dai-ni shuu wo yotei shite orimasu. Shujutsu ni sakidachi, ni shuukan mae ni jutsuzenkensa wo okonaimasu. Sono aida, ketsueki wo sarasara ni suru kusuri wa fukuyou wo chuushi sezaru wo emasen.
question.arti: Regarding the surgery schedule, we're scheduling it for the second week of next month. Two weeks before surgery, pre-operative examinations will be done. During that period, blood thinning medication must be stopped.

choices.jepang: 薬(くすり)をやめるのは不安(ふあん)ですが、先生(せんせい)の判断(はんだん)に基(もと)づいて指示(しじ)に従(したが)います。服用(ふくよう)中(ちゅう)の薬(くすり)のリストをお持(も)ちしましたので、ご確認(かくにん)いただけますか。
choices.romaji: Kusuri wo yameru no wa fuan desu ga, sensei no handan ni motozuite shiji ni shitagaimasu. Fukuyouchuu no kusuri no risuto wo omochi shimashita node, go-kakunin itadakemasu ka.
choices.arti: Stopping medication is concerning, but I'll follow the instructions based on the doctor's judgment. I've brought a list of my current medications. Could you check it?

choices.jepang: 薬(くすり)はやめたくありません。飲(の)みながら手術(しゅじゅつ)してください。
choices.romaji: Kusuri wa yametaku arimasen. Nominagara shujutsu shite kudasai.
choices.arti: I don't want to stop taking medication. Please do the surgery while I continue taking it.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に基づいて để cho thấy trust in chuyên nghiệp medical judgment while preparing a medication list. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai refuses medical instructions important for surgical safety.

conversation.speaker: 患者(かんじゃ)

question.jepang: 入院(にゅういん)期間(きかん)はどのくらいを想定(そうてい)しておけばよいでしょうか。仕事(しごと)の調整(ちょうせい)もありますので。
question.romaji: Nyuuin kikan wa dono kurai wo soutei shite okeba yoi deshou ka. Shigoto no chousei mo arimasu node.
question.arti: How long is the estimated hospitalization period? I also need to adjust my work schedule.

choices.jepang: 一日(いちにち)で退院(たいいん)できます。次(つぎ)の日(ひ)から普通(ふつう)に歩(ある)けますよ。
choices.romaji: Ichinichi de taiin dekimasu. Tsugi no hi kara futsuu ni arukemasu yo.
choices.arti: You can go home the same day. You'll be able to walk normally the next day.

choices.jepang: 術後(じゅつご)の経過(けいか)にもよりますが、通常(つうじょう)は5日(いつか)から7日(なのか)程度(ていど)の入院(にゅういん)を想定(そうてい)しております。退院後(たいいんご)もリハビリが必要(ひつよう)となりますので、完全(かんぜん)復帰(ふっき)に至(いた)るまで約(やく)2ヶ月(かげつ)を見込(みこ)んでいただければと思(おも)います。
choices.romaji: Jutsugo no keika ni mo yorimasu ga, tsuujou wa itsuka kara nanoka teido no nyuuin wo soutei shite orimasu. Taiin go mo rihabiri ga hitsuyou to narimasu node, kanzen fukki ni itaru made yaku ni kagetsu wo mikonde itadakereba to omoimasu.
choices.arti: Depending on post-operative progress, we usually estimate about 5 to 7 days of hospitalization. After discharge, rehabilitation is also needed, so please factor in about 2 months for full recovery.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に至るまで để giải thích the entire recovery process from hospitalization to full recovery. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai cung cấp không thực tế and nguy hiểm estimates.

conversation.speaker: 高橋(たかはし)医師(いし)

question.jepang: 手術(しゅじゅつ)費用(ひよう)に関(かん)してですが、健康(けんこう)保険(ほけん)が適用(てきよう)されます。ただし、高額(こうがく)療養費(りょうようひ)制度(せいど)をご利用(りよう)いただくことをお勧(すす)めします。
question.romaji: Shujutsu hiyou ni kanshite desu ga, kenkou hoken ga tekiyou saremasu. Tadashi, kougaku ryouyouhi seido wo go-riyou itadaku koto wo osusume shimasu.
question.arti: Regarding surgery costs, health insurance applies. However, we recommend you utilize the high-cost medical expense system.

choices.jepang: 高額(こうがく)療養費(りょうようひ)制度(せいど)の利用(りよう)に先立(さきだ)ち、事前(じぜん)に限度額(げんどがく)適用(てきよう)認定証(にんていしょう)を取得(しゅとく)しておいた方(ほう)がよいでしょうか。手続(てつづ)きの流(なが)れについても教(おし)えていただけると助(たす)かります。
choices.romaji: Kougaku ryouyouhi seido no riyou ni sakidachi, jizen ni gendogaku tekiyou ninteishou wo shutoku shite oita hou ga yoi deshou ka. Tetsuzuki no nagare ni tsuite mo oshiete itadakeru to tasukarimasu.
choices.arti: Prior to utilizing the high-cost medical expense system, should I obtain a cost limit certificate first? It would be very helpful if you could explain the procedure flow.

choices.jepang: お金(かね)のことは考(かんが)えたくありません。
choices.romaji: Okane no koto wa kangaetaku arimasen.
choices.arti: I don't want to think about money.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に先立ち to proactively ask about administrative preparation before surgery. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai avoids an important aspect of treatment cost planning.

conversation.speaker: 患者(かんじゃ)

question.jepang: 家族(かぞく)にも手術(しゅじゅつ)のことを説明(せつめい)したいのですが、一緒(いっしょ)に来院(らいいん)して先生(せんせい)からも説明(せつめい)していただくことは可能(かのう)でしょうか。
question.romaji: Kazoku ni mo shujutsu no koto wo setsumei shitai no desu ga, issho ni raiin shite sensei kara mo setsumei shite itadaku koto wa kanou deshou ka.
question.arti: I'd like để giải thích this surgery to my family as well. Would it be possible for them to come along and receive an explanation from the doctor?

choices.jepang: もちろんです。手術(しゅじゅつ)に関(かかわ)る全(すべ)ての事項(じこう)について、ご家族(かぞく)にもご理解(りかい)いただくことが大切(たいせつ)です。次回(じかい)の診察(しんさつ)にご家族(かぞく)をお連(つ)れいただければ、改(あらた)めてご説明(せつめい)いたします。
choices.romaji: Mochiron desu. Shujutsu ni kakawaru subete no jikou ni tsuite, go-kazoku ni mo go-rikai itadaku koto ga taisetsu desu. Jikai no shinsatsu ni go-kazoku wo otsure itadakereba, aratamete go-setsumei itashimasu.
choices.arti: Of course. It's important for the family to understand everything related to the surgery. If you bring your family to the next visit, I'll explain again.

choices.jepang: 家族(かぞく)に説明(せつめい)する時間(じかん)はありません。ご自身(じしん)で説明(せつめい)してください。
choices.romaji: Kazoku ni setsumei suru jikan wa arimasen. Go-jishin de setsumei shite kudasai.
choices.arti: There's no time để giải thích to family. Please explain yourself.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~にかかわる để nhấn mạnh tầm quan trọng của the family understanding all aspects related to the surgery. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai cho thấy an uncaring doctor attitude toward the patient's needs.

conversation.speaker: 高橋(たかはし)医師(いし)

question.jepang: 術後(じゅつご)のリハビリについてもご説明(せつめい)しておきます。回復(かいふく)の度合(どあ)いに応(おう)じて、段階的(だんかいてき)に運動(うんどう)量(りょう)を増(ふ)やしていきます。リハビリの専門(せんもん)スタッフがサポートいたします。
question.romaji: Jutsugo no rihabiri ni tsuite mo go-setsumei shite okimasu. Kaifuku no doai ni oujite, dankaiteki ni undouryou wo fuyashite ikimasu. Rihabiri no senmon sutaffu ga sapooto itashimasu.
question.arti: I'll also explain about post-operative rehabilitation. According to the level of recovery, the amount of exercise will be gradually increased. Specialist rehabilitation staff will provide support.

choices.jepang: リハビリは面倒(めんどう)なのでやりたくないです。
choices.romaji: Rihabiri wa mendou na node yaritaku nai desu.
choices.arti: Rehabilitation is troublesome so I don't want it.

choices.jepang: 承知(しょうち)しました。回復(かいふく)を通(つう)じて元(もと)の生活(せいかつ)に戻(もど)れるよう、リハビリにも積極的(せっきょくてき)に取(と)り組(く)みたいと思(おも)います。具体的(ぐたいてき)なリハビリの計画(けいかく)について教(おし)えていただけますか。
choices.romaji: Shouchi shimashita. Kaifuku wo tsuujite moto no seikatsu ni modoreru you, rihabiri ni mo sekkyokuteki ni torikumitai to omoimasu. Gutaiteki na rihabiri no keikaku ni tsuite oshiete itadakemasu ka.
choices.arti: Understood. Through the recovery process, I want to actively engage in rehabilitation to return to my normal life. Could you explain the concrete rehabilitation plan?

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~を通じて để cho thấy commitment to the recovery process toàn diệnly. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai refuses rehabilitation that is crucial for good surgical outcomes.

conversation.speaker: 患者(かんじゃ)

question.jepang: 先生(せんせい)、本日(ほんじつ)は詳(くわ)しくご説明(せつめい)いただきありがとうございました。不安(ふあん)もありますが、先生(せんせい)を信頼(しんらい)しておりますので、手術(しゅじゅつ)をお願(ねが)いしたいと思(おも)います。
question.romaji: Sensei, honjitsu wa kuwashiku go-setsumei itadaki arigatou gozaimashita. Fuan mo arimasu ga, sensei wo shinrai shite orimasu node, shujutsu wo onegai shitai to omoimasu.
question.arti: Doctor, thank you for the detailed explanation today. I have concerns, but I trust you, so I'd like để hỏi you to perform the surgery.

choices.jepang: 大丈夫(だいじょうぶ)ですよ。簡単(かんたん)な手術(しゅじゅつ)ですから。
choices.romaji: Daijoubu desu yo. Kantan na shujutsu desu kara.
choices.arti: Relax. The surgery is easy.

choices.jepang: ご信頼(しんらい)いただきありがとうございます。最善(さいぜん)の結果(けっか)を出(だ)せるよう、医療(いりょう)チーム一同(いちどう)、全力(ぜんりょく)をもって対応(たいおう)いたします。何(なに)かご不安(ふあん)な点(てん)がございましたら、いつでもご連絡(れんらく)ください。
choices.romaji: Go-shinrai itadaki arigatou gozaimasu. Saizen no kekka wo daseru you, iryou chiimu ichidou, zenryoku wo motte taiou itashimasu. Nanika go-fuan na ten ga gozaimashitara, itsudemo go-renraku kudasai.
choices.arti: Thank you for your trust. In order to deliver the best results, the entire medical team will handle it with all our effort. If anything concerns you, please contact us anytime.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~をもって để thể hiện the medical team's full commitment to handling the surgery. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai xem nhẹ a medical procedure, which is unbecoming of a chuyên nghiệp doctor.

title: Mua bất động sản

conversation.speaker: 木村(きむら)不動産(ふどうさん)エージェント

question.jepang: 本日(ほんじつ)はマンションのご購入(こうにゅう)を検討(けんとう)されているとのことですが、ご希望(きぼう)の条件(じょうけん)をお聞(き)かせいただけますか。
question.romaji: Honjitsu wa manshon no go-kounyuu wo kentou sarete iru to no koto desu ga, go-kibou no jouken wo okikase itadakemasu ka.
question.arti: Today you're considering buying an apartment. Could you tell me your desired conditions?

choices.jepang: なんでもいいです。安(やす)ければそれでいいです。
choices.romaji: Nan demo ii desu. Yasukereba sore de ii desu.
choices.arti: Anything is fine. Just cheap.

choices.jepang: 家族(かぞく)構成(こうせい)の変化(へんか)に伴(ともな)い、より広(ひろ)い住居(じゅうきょ)が必要(ひつよう)になりました。駅(えき)から徒歩(とほ)10分(ぷん)以内(いない)で、3LDK以上(いじょう)、予算(よさん)は5000万円(まんえん)前後(ぜんご)を考(かんが)えております。
choices.romaji: Kazoku kousei no henka ni tomonai, yori hiroi juukyo ga hitsuyou ni narimashita. Eki kara toho juppun inai de, san-erudiikee ijou, yosan wa gosen man en zengo wo kangaete orimasu.
choices.arti: Along with changes in family composition, a larger home is needed. Within 10 minutes walking from the station, at least 3LDK, with a budget of around 50 million yen.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に伴い để giải thích the reason for property search related to family changes with specific conditions. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai doesn't provide enough information for the real estate agent.

conversation.speaker: 木村(きむら)エージェント

question.jepang: 承知(しょうち)いたしました。ご条件(じょうけん)に即(そく)して、いくつかの物件(ぶっけん)をご紹介(しょうかい)できます。まず、こちらの築(ちく)5年(ねん)のマンションはいかがでしょうか。駅(えき)から徒歩(とほ)8分(ぷん)、3LDKで4800万円(まんえん)です。
question.romaji: Shouchi itashimashita. Go-jouken ni sokushite, ikutsuka no bukken wo go-shoukai dekimasu. Mazu, kochira no chiku go-nen no manshon wa ikaga deshou ka. Eki kara toho hachi-fun, san-erudiikee de yonsen happyaku man en desu.
question.arti: Understood. According to your conditions, I can introduce several properties. First, how about this 5-year-old apartment? 8 minutes from the station, 3LDK for 48 million yen.

choices.jepang: 立地(りっち)と価格(かかく)は条件(じょうけん)に合(あ)っていますね。管理費(かんりひ)や修繕(しゅうぜん)積立金(つみたてきん)を含(ふく)めた月々(つきづき)のランニングコストについても教(おし)えていただけますか。また、周辺(しゅうへん)の教育(きょういく)環境(かんきょう)についても伺(うかが)いたいのですが。
choices.romaji: Ricchi to kakaku wa jouken ni atte imasu ne. Kanrihi ya shuuzen tsumitatekin wo fukumeta tsukizuki no ranningu kosuto ni tsuite mo oshiete itadakemasu ka. Mata, shuuhen no kyouiku kankyou ni tsuite mo ukagaitai no desu ga.
choices.arti: The location and price match my desired conditions. Could you also provide information about monthly costs including management fees and repair reserve fund? I'd also like để hỏi about the surrounding educational environment.

choices.jepang: すぐに買(か)います。明日(あした)契約(けいやく)できますか。
choices.romaji: Sugu ni kaimasu. Ashita keiyaku dekimasu ka.
choices.arti: I'll buy it right away. Can we sign the contract tomorrow?

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cho thấy toàn diện consideration including operating costs and educational environment for the family. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is quá vội vàng mà không mature consideration for a property purchase.

conversation.speaker: 購入者(こうにゅうしゃ)

question.jepang: 住宅(じゅうたく)ローンについて伺(うかが)いたいのですが、現在(げんざい)の金利(きんり)動向(どうこう)を踏(ふ)まえて、固定(こてい)金利(きんり)と変動(へんどう)金利(きんり)のどちらが有利(ゆうり)でしょうか。
question.romaji: Juutaku roon ni tsuite ukagaitai no desu ga, genzai no kinri doukou wo fumaete, kotei kinri to hendou kinri no dochira ga yuuri deshou ka.
question.arti: I'd like để hỏi about the home loan. Based on current interest rate trends, which is more advantageous, fixed or variable rate?

choices.jepang: 金利(きんり)のことはよくわかりません。銀行(ぎんこう)に聞(き)いてください。
choices.romaji: Kinri no koto wa yoku wakarimasen. Ginkou ni kiite kudasai.
choices.arti: I don't understand much about interest rates. Please ask the bank.

choices.jepang: 現在(げんざい)の経済(けいざい)状況(じょうきょう)を踏(ふ)まえますと、金利(きんり)上昇(じょうしょう)リスクに備(そな)えて固定(こてい)金利(きんり)を選(えら)ばれる方(かた)が増(ふ)えております。ただ、お客様(きゃくさま)の返済(へんさい)計画(けいかく)に応(おう)じて最適(さいてき)なプランをご提案(ていあん)できますので、詳(くわ)しい資金(しきん)計画(けいかく)を拝見(はいけん)させてください。
choices.romaji: Genzai no keizai joukyou wo fumaemasu to, kinri joushou risuku ni sonaete kotei kinri wo erabareru kata ga fuete orimasu. Tada, okyakusama no hensai keikaku ni oujite saiteki na puran wo go-teian dekimasu node, kuwashii shikin keikaku wo haiken sasete kudasai.
choices.arti: Based on the current economic conditions, more people are choosing fixed rates to hedge against interest rate rise risk. However, we can propose the optimal plan according to your repayment plan, so let me look at the detailed financial plan.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~を踏まえて and ~に応じて để cung cấp advice based on economic conditions tailored to the client's needs. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai cho thấy the agent's inability để cung cấp important information.

conversation.speaker: 木村(きむら)エージェント

question.jepang: この物件(ぶっけん)は新耐震(しんたいしん)基準(きじゅん)に基(もと)づいて建設(けんせつ)されており、地震(じしん)に対(たい)する安全性(あんぜんせい)は高(たか)いと言(い)えます。ハザードマップも確認(かくにん)済(ず)みです。
question.romaji: Kono bukken wa shintaishin kijun ni motozuite kensetsu sarete ori, jishin ni taisuru anzensei wa takai to iemasu. Hazaado mappu mo kakunin zumi desu.
question.arti: This property was built based on new earthquake resistance standards, and it can be said to have high earthquake safety. The hazard map has also been confirmed.

choices.jepang: 地震(じしん)は気(き)にしません。日本(にほん)はどこでも地震(じしん)がありますから。
choices.romaji: Jishin wa ki ni shimasen. Nihon wa doko demo jishin ga arimasu kara.
choices.arti: I don't care about earthquakes. Japan has earthquakes everywhere.

choices.jepang: 耐震性(たいしんせい)については安心(あんしん)しました。それに加(くわ)えて、過去(かこ)の災害(さいがい)履歴(りれき)や浸水(しんすい)リスクに関(かかわ)る情報(じょうほう)も確認(かくにん)させていただけますか。家族(かぞく)の安全(あんぜん)にかかわることですので。
choices.romaji: Taishinsei ni tsuite wa anshin shimashita. Sore ni kuwaete, kako no saigai rireki ya shinsui risuku ni kakawaru jouhou mo kakunin sasete itadakemasu ka. Kazoku no anzen ni kakawaru koto desu node.
choices.arti: I feel reassured about the earthquake resistance. Additionally, could I also confirm information related to the disaster history and flood risk? Because it concerns my family's safety.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~にかかわる để nhấn mạnh that safety information is directly related to family safety. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai xem nhẹ serious disaster risk.

conversation.speaker: 購入者(こうにゅうしゃ)

question.jepang: 内覧(ないらん)をした上(うえ)で、購入(こうにゅう)を決(き)めたいのですが、いつ頃(ごろ)可能(かのう)でしょうか。
question.romaji: Nairan wo shita ue de, kounyuu wo kimetai no desu ga, itsu goro kanou deshou ka.
question.arti: I'd like to make a purchase decision after a site visit. When would be possible?

choices.jepang: 内覧(ないらん)はいつでも可能(かのう)です。ご都合(つごう)に応(おう)じて日程(にってい)を調整(ちょうせい)いたします。内覧(ないらん)に先立(さきだ)ち、チェックリストをお渡(わた)ししますので、気(き)になる点(てん)を事前(じぜん)にまとめておいていただけると効率的(こうりつてき)です。
choices.romaji: Nairan wa itsu demo kanou desu. Go-tsugou ni oujite nittei wo chousei itashimasu. Nairan ni sakidachi, chekku risuto wo owatashi shimasu node, ki ni naru ten wo jizen ni matomete oite itadakeru to kouritsuteki desu.
choices.arti: A visit is possible anytime. We'll adjust the schedule according to your availability. Before the visit, I'll provide a checklist, so it would be more efficient if you prepare what you want to check in advance.

choices.jepang: 内覧(ないらん)しなくても写真(しゃしん)で十分(じゅうぶん)ですよ。
choices.romaji: Nairan shinakute mo shashin de juubun desu yo.
choices.arti: Even mà không a visit, photos are enough.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に応じて and ~に先立ち để cho thấy service tailored to the client and organized preparation. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai bỏ qua tầm quan trọng của on-site visits in property purchases.

conversation.speaker: 木村(きむら)エージェント

question.jepang: 契約(けいやく)に至(いた)るまでのプロセスについてご説明(せつめい)いたします。まず重要(じゅうよう)事項(じこう)説明(せつめい)を行(おこな)い、その後(ご)売買(ばいばい)契約(けいやく)の締結(ていけつ)、そして決済(けっさい)・引(ひ)き渡(わた)しとなります。
question.romaji: Keiyaku ni itaru made no purosesu ni tsuite go-setsumei itashimasu. Mazu juuyou jikou setsumei wo okonai, sono go baibai keiyaku no teiketsu, soshite kessai / hikiwatashi to narimasu.
question.arti: I'll explain the process until the contract. First is the important matters explanation, then signing the purchase contract, then payment and handover.

choices.jepang: 面倒(めんどう)な手続(てつづ)きは全部(ぜんぶ)省略(しょうりゃく)してもらえませんか。
choices.romaji: Mendou na tetsuzuki wa zenbu shouryaku shite moraemasen ka.
choices.arti: Can all the troublesome procedures be skipped?

choices.jepang: 詳(くわ)しいご説明(せつめい)ありがとうございます。重要(じゅうよう)事項(じこう)説明(せつめい)から引(ひ)き渡(わた)しに至(いた)るまで、どの程度(ていど)の期間(きかん)がかかりますか。また、手付金(てつけきん)の金額(きんがく)についても確認(かくにん)させてください。
choices.romaji: Kuwashii go-setsumei arigatou gozaimasu. Juuyou jikou setsumei kara hikiwatashi ni itaru made, dono teido no kikan ga kakarimasu ka. Mata, tetsukekin no kingaku ni tsuite mo kakunin sasete kudasai.
choices.arti: Thank you for the detailed explanation. From the important matters explanation through to handover, how long does it take? Also, let me confirm the down payment amount.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に至るまで để hỏi about the duration of the entire purchase process in a structured way. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai wants to skip legal procedures important in property transactions.

conversation.speaker: 購入者(こうにゅうしゃ)

question.jepang: 将来的(しょうらいてき)に転勤(てんきん)の可能性(かのうせい)もあるのですが、その場合(ばあい)、賃貸(ちんたい)に出(だ)すことも視野(しや)に入(い)れています。この地域(ちいき)の賃貸(ちんたい)需要(じゅよう)はいかがでしょうか。
question.romaji: Shouraiteki ni tenkin no kanousei mo aru no desu ga, sono baai, chintai ni dasu koto mo shiya ni irete imasu. Kono chiiki no chintai juyou wa ikaga deshou ka.
question.arti: There's a possibility of a job transfer in the future. In that case, I'm also considering renting it out. How's the rental demand in this area?

choices.jepang: この地域(ちいき)は再開発(さいかいはつ)計画(けいかく)が進行(しんこう)しており、人口(じんこう)増加(ぞうか)に伴(ともな)い賃貸(ちんたい)需要(じゅよう)も安定(あんてい)しております。資産(しさん)価値(かち)の維持(いじ)という観点(かんてん)からも、良(よ)い選択(せんたく)かと存(ぞん)じます。
choices.romaji: Kono chiiki wa saikaihatsu keikaku ga shinkou shite ori, jinkou zouka ni tomonai chintai juyou mo antei shite orimasu. Shisan kachi no iji to iu kanten kara mo, yoi sentaku ka to zonjimasu.
choices.arti: This area is in the process of a redevelopment plan, and as the population grows, rental demand is also stable. From an asset value preservation perspective, this is a good choice.

choices.jepang: 賃貸(ちんたい)のことは将来(しょうらい)の話(はなし)なので、今(いま)は考(かんが)えなくていいですよ。
choices.romaji: Chintai no koto wa shourai no hanashi na node, ima wa kangaenakute ii desu yo.
choices.arti: Renting is a future matter. No need to think about it now.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に伴い để giải thích the relationship between population growth and rental demand stability. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai bỏ qua important long-term investment considerations.

conversation.speaker: 木村(きむら)エージェント

question.jepang: マンションの管理(かんり)組合(くみあい)の運営(うんえい)状況(じょうきょう)も重要(じゅうよう)なポイントです。修繕(しゅうぜん)積立金(つみたてきん)の積立(つみたて)状況(じょうきょう)や、過去(かこ)の大規模(だいきぼ)修繕(しゅうぜん)の実施(じっし)記録(きろく)もご確認(かくにん)いただけます。
question.romaji: Manshon no kanri kumiai no un'ei joukyou mo juuyou na pointo desu. Shuuzen tsumitatekin no tsumitate joukyou ya, kako no daikibo shuuzen no jisshi kiroku mo go-kakunin itadakemasu.
question.arti: The management association's operational condition is also an important point. You can also confirm the status of repair fund accumulation and past major renovation records.

choices.jepang: 管理(かんり)組合(くみあい)のことは興味(きょうみ)ありません。
choices.romaji: Kanri kumiai no koto wa kyoumi arimasen.
choices.arti: I'm not interested in the management association.

choices.jepang: おっしゃる通(とお)り、管理(かんり)状況(じょうきょう)は資産(しさん)価値(かち)にかかわる重要(じゅうよう)な要素(ようそ)ですね。議事録(ぎじろく)や修繕(しゅうぜん)計画(けいかく)の資料(しりょう)を拝見(はいけん)させていただくことは可能(かのう)でしょうか。
choices.romaji: Ossharu toori, kanri joukyou wa shisan kachi ni kakawaru juuyou na youso desu ne. Gijiroku ya shuuzen keikaku no shiryou wo haiken sasete itadaku koto wa kanou deshou ka.
choices.arti: Exactly as you say, operational condition is an important factor related to asset value. Would it be possible for me to see the meeting minutes and repair plan documents?

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~にかかわる to understand that apartment management is directly related to long-term asset value. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai bỏ qua an important aspect of property purchase.

conversation.speaker: 購入者(こうにゅうしゃ)

question.jepang: 税金(ぜいきん)面(めん)についても確認(かくにん)したいのですが、住宅(じゅうたく)購入(こうにゅう)に伴(ともな)う税制(ぜいせい)優遇(ゆうぐう)にはどのようなものがありますか。
question.romaji: Zeikin men ni tsuite mo kakunin shitai no desu ga, juutaku kounyuu ni tomonau zeisei yuuguu ni wa dono you na mono ga arimasu ka.
question.arti: I'd also like to confirm the tax aspects. What are the tax incentives that come with purchasing a home?

choices.jepang: 住宅(じゅうたく)購入(こうにゅう)に伴(ともな)う税制(ぜいせい)優遇(ゆうぐう)としては、住宅(じゅうたく)ローン控除(こうじょ)が最(もっと)も大(おお)きな制度(せいど)です。年末(ねんまつ)のローン残高(ざんだか)に基(もと)づいて所得税(しょとくぜい)から控除(こうじょ)されます。不動産(ふどうさん)取得税(しゅとくぜい)の軽減(けいげん)措置(そち)もございます。
choices.romaji: Juutaku kounyuu ni tomonau zeisei yuuguu to shite wa, juutaku roon koujo ga mottomo ookina seido desu. Nenmatsu no roon zandaka ni motozuite shotokuzei kara koujo saremasu. Fudousan shutokuzei no keigen sochi mo gozaimasu.
choices.arti: As tax incentives that come with home purchase, the housing loan deduction is the biggest system. Based on the year-end loan balance, it's deducted from income tax. There are also measures for reducing the property acquisition tax.

choices.jepang: 税金(ぜいきん)のことは税理士(ぜいりし)に聞(き)いてください。私(わたし)にはわかりません。
choices.romaji: Zeikin no koto wa zeirishi ni kiite kudasai. Watashi ni wa wakarimasen.
choices.arti: Ask a tax consultant about taxes. I don't understand.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に伴う and ~に基づいて để giải thích tax incentives chuyên nghiệply. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai cho thấy a lack of basic knowledge that a property agent should have.

conversation.speaker: 木村(きむら)エージェント

question.jepang: それでは、内覧(ないらん)の日程(にってい)を調整(ちょうせい)いたしましょう。ご購入(こうにゅう)の意思(いし)が固(かた)まりましたら、スムーズに手続(てつづ)きを進(すす)められるよう、全力(ぜんりょく)でサポートいたします。
question.romaji: Sore dewa, nairan no nittei wo chousei itashimashou. Go-kounyuu no ishi ga katamarimashitara, sumuuzu ni tetsuzuki wo susumerareru you, zenryoku de sapooto itashimasu.
question.arti: Well then, let's arrange the visit schedule. If your purchase decision is firm, we will fully support you to ensure the procedures go smoothly.

choices.jepang: 面倒(めんどう)なのでやっぱりやめます。
choices.romaji: Mendou na node yappari yamemasu.
choices.arti: It's too troublesome so let's cancel.

choices.jepang: ありがとうございます。家族(かぞく)とも相談(そうだん)した上(うえ)で内覧(ないらん)に臨(のぞ)みたいと思(おも)います。ご紹介(しょうかい)いただいた物件(ぶっけん)の資料(しりょう)を持(も)ち帰(かえ)らせていただいてもよろしいでしょうか。
choices.romaji: Arigatou gozaimasu. Kazoku to mo soudan shita ue de nairan ni nozomitai to omoimasu. Go-shoukai itadaita bukken no shiryou wo mochikaera sete itadaite mo yoroshii deshou ka.
choices.arti: Thank you. I'd also like to consult with my family before the visit. May I take home the property documents that were introduced?

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cho thấy a mature approach by involving family in the decision and requesting documents for further consideration. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai abruptly cancels mà không a clear reason.

title: Thực tập tại công ty Nhật Bản

conversation.speaker: 渡辺(わたなべ)人事部長(じんじぶちょう)

question.jepang: 本日(ほんじつ)はインターンシップの面接(めんせつ)にお越(こ)しいただきありがとうございます。まず、弊社(へいしゃ)のインターンに応募(おうぼ)した動機(どうき)をお聞(き)かせください。

question.arti: Thank you for coming to the internship interview today. First, please tell us your motivation for applying to our company.

choices.jepang: 特(とく)に理由(りゆう)はありません。友達(ともだち)に勧(すす)められたので来(き)ました。
choices.romaji: Toku ni riyuu wa arimasen. Tomodachi ni susumerareta node kimashita.
choices.arti: No particular reason. I came because a friend recommended it.

choices.jepang: 御社(おんしゃ)はアジア市場(しじょう)における先進的(せんしんてき)な事業(じぎょう)展開(てんかい)にかけては業界(ぎょうかい)でも高(たか)く評価(ひょうか)されています。将来(しょうらい)、国際(こくさい)ビジネスに携(たずさ)わりたいと考(かんが)えておりますので、御社(おんしゃ)での実務(じつむ)経験(けいけん)を通(つう)じて知見(ちけん)を深(ふか)めたいと思(おも)い、応募(おうぼ)いたしました。
choices.romaji: Onsha wa Ajia shijou ni okeru senshinteki na jigyou tenkai ni kakete wa gyoukai de mo takaku hyouka sarete imasu. Shourai, kokusai bijinesu ni tazusawaritai to kangaete orimasu node, onsha de no jitsumu keiken wo tsuujite chiken wo fukaketai to omoi, oubo itashimashita.
choices.arti: Your company is highly regarded in the industry for innovative business development in the Asian market. Since I want to be involved in international business in the future, I applied hoping to deepen my knowledge through hands-on experience at your company.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~にかけては to praise the company's strength in a specific area and ~を通じて để giải thích the internship purpose. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai cho thấy no motivation or preparation at all.

conversation.speaker: 渡辺(わたなべ)人事部長(じんじぶちょう)
