question.arti: I'd like để hỏi about your Japanese language ability. Do you have experience using Japanese in a business setting?

choices.jepang: 大学(だいがく)で日本語(にほんご)を専攻(せんこう)しており、ビジネス日本語(にほんご)の授業(じゅぎょう)も履修(りしゅう)いたしました。また、日本(にほん)企業(きぎょう)の現地(げんち)法人(ほうじん)でアルバイトをした経験(けいけん)があり、メールの作成(さくせい)や電話(でんわ)対応(たいおう)を通(つう)じて実践的(じっせんてき)なビジネス日本語(にほんご)を学(まな)んでまいりました。
choices.romaji: Daigaku de nihongo wo senkou shite ori, bijinesu nihongo no jugyou mo rishuu itashimashita. Mata, nihon kigyou no genchi houjin de arubaito wo shita keiken ga ari, meeru no sakusei ya denwa taiou wo tsuujite jissenteki na bijinesu nihongo wo manande mairimashita.
choices.arti: I majored in Japanese at university and also took business Japanese courses. Additionally, I have part-time work experience at a local branch of a Japanese company, and through creating emails and handling phone calls, I've learned practical business Japanese.

choices.jepang: 日本語(にほんご)はアニメで覚(おぼ)えました。ビジネスでは使(つか)ったことがありません。
choices.romaji: Nihongo wa anime de oboemashita. Bijinesu de wa tsukatta koto ga arimasen.
choices.arti: I learned Japanese from anime. I've never used it in business.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~を通じて để giải thích how practical experience helped develop business Japanese skills. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai cho thấy a lack of relevant chuyên nghiệp experience.

conversation.speaker: 渡辺(わたなべ)人事部長(じんじぶちょう)

question.jepang: 弊社(へいしゃ)のインターンシップは3ヶ月間(かげつかん)で、実際(じっさい)のプロジェクトに参加(さんか)していただきます。残業(ざんぎょう)が発生(はっせい)する可能性(かのうせい)もありますが、それでも問題(もんだい)ありませんか。
question.romaji: Heisha no intaanshippu wa san kagetsu kan de, jissai no purojekuto ni sanka shite itadakimasu. Zangyou ga hassei suru kanousei mo arimasu ga, sore demo mondai arimasen ka.
question.arti: The internship at our company is 3 months, and you'll participate in actual projects. There's also a possibility of overtime. Is that okay?

choices.jepang: 残業(ざんぎょう)はしたくありません。定時(ていじ)で帰(かえ)りたいです。
choices.romaji: Zangyou wa shitaku arimasen. Teiji de kaeritai desu.
choices.arti: I don't want overtime. I want to go home on time.

choices.jepang: プロジェクトの状況(じょうきょう)に応(おう)じて柔軟(じゅうなん)に対応(たいおう)いたします。実(じつ)プロジェクトに参加(さんか)できる機会(きかい)は非常(ひじょう)に貴重(きちょう)ですので、責任(せきにん)を持(も)って取(と)り組(く)みたいと考(かんが)えております。
choices.romaji: Purojekuto no joukyou ni oujite juunan ni taiou itashimasu. Jitsu purojekuto ni sanka dekiru kikai wa hijou ni kichou desu node, sekinin wo motte torikumitai to kangaete orimasu.
choices.arti: I will respond flexibly according to the project situation. The opportunity to participate in actual projects is very valuable, so I want to work on it with full responsibility.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に応じて để cho thấy flexibility and commitment to the project. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai cho thấy an attitude inconsistent with Japanese work culture.

conversation.speaker: 松本(まつもと)課長(かちょう)

question.jepang: 配属先(はいぞくさき)の海外(かいがい)事業部(じぎょうぶ)について説明(せつめい)します。当部署(とうぶしょ)では、東南(とうなん)アジアを中心(ちゅうしん)に事業(じぎょう)を展開(てんかい)しています。文化(ぶんか)や商慣習(しょうかんしゅう)の違(ちが)いにかかわらず、円滑(えんかつ)なコミュニケーションが求(もと)められます。
question.romaji: Haizokusaki no kaigai jigyoubu ni tsuite setsumei shimasu. Toubusho de wa, tounan Ajia wo chuushin ni jigyou wo tenkai shite imasu. Bunka ya shoukanshu no chigai ni kakawarazu, enkatsu na komyunikeeshon ga motomeraremasu.
question.arti: I'll explain about the overseas business division where you'll be placed. This division develops business focused on Southeast Asia. Regardless of differences in culture and business customs, smooth communication is required.

choices.jepang: 東南(とうなん)アジアの文化(ぶんか)や商慣習(しょうかんしゅう)には精通(せいつう)しておりませんが、大学(だいがく)で異文化(いぶんか)コミュニケーションを学(まな)んだ経験(けいけん)を踏(ふ)まえて、柔軟(じゅうなん)に適応(てきおう)していく所存(しょぞん)です。積極的(せっきょくてき)に現地(げんち)の方々(かたがた)との交流(こうりゅう)を深(ふか)めたいと思(おも)います。
choices.romaji: Tounan Ajia no bunka ya shoukanshu ni wa seitsuu shite orimasen ga, daigaku de ibunka komyunikeeshon wo mananda keiken wo fumaete, juunan ni tekiou shite iku shozon desu. Sekkyokuteki ni genchi no katagata to no kouryuu wo fukametai to omoimasu.
choices.arti: I haven't mastered Southeast Asian culture and business customs yet, but based on my experience studying cross-cultural communication at university, I intend to adapt flexibly. I want to actively deepen exchanges with local people.

choices.jepang: 東南(とうなん)アジアに興味(きょうみ)はありません。ヨーロッパの部署(ぶしょ)に配属(はいぞく)してもらえませんか。
choices.romaji: Tounan Ajia ni kyoumi wa arimasen. Yooroppa no busho ni haizoku shite moraemasen ka.
choices.arti: I'm not interested in Southeast Asia. Can I be placed in the Europe division?

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~を踏まえて để cho thấy how academic experience forms the basis for adapting to a new environment. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai rejects the assigned placement, thể hiện an không chuyên nghiệp attitude.

conversation.speaker: 渡辺(わたなべ)人事部長(じんじぶちょう)

question.jepang: インターンシップの開始(かいし)に先立(さきだ)ち、ビジネスマナー研修(けんしゅう)を受(う)けていただきます。名刺(めいし)交換(こうかん)から敬語(けいご)の使(つか)い方(かた)に至(いた)るまで、実践的(じっせんてき)な内容(ないよう)となっております。
question.romaji: Intaanshippu no kaishi ni sakidachi, bijinesu manaa kenshuu wo ukete itadakimasu. Meishi koukan kara keigo no tsukaikata ni itaru made, jissenteki na naiyou to natte orimasu.
question.arti: Before starting the internship, you'll attend business etiquette training. From exchanging business cards to using polite language, the content is practical.

choices.jepang: マナー研修(けんしゅう)は必要(ひつよう)ないと思(おも)います。もう知(し)っていますから。
choices.romaji: Manaa kenshuu wa hitsuyou nai to omoimasu. Mou shitte imasu kara.
choices.arti: I don't think etiquette training is necessary. I already know everything.

choices.jepang: ぜひ参加(さんか)させていただきたいです。日本(にほん)のビジネスマナーは独特(どくとく)な面(めん)がございますので、実務(じつむ)に入(はい)る前(まえ)にしっかり学(まな)んでおきたいと考(かんが)えております。特(とく)に敬語(けいご)の使(つか)い方(かた)は実践(じっせん)を通(つう)じて身(み)につけたいです。
choices.romaji: Zehi sanka sasete itadakitai desu. Nihon no bijinesu manaa wa dokutoku na men ga gozaimasu node, jitsumu ni hairu mae ni shikkari manande okitai to kangaete orimasu. Toku ni keigo no tsukaikata wa jissen wo tsuujite mi ni tsuketai desu.
choices.arti: I'd love to participate. Japanese business etiquette has unique aspects, so I want to learn it thoroughly before entering practical work. Especially polite language usage — I want to master it through practice.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~を通じて để cho thấy willingness to learn through hands-on practice and a humble attitude. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai cho thấy arrogance không phù hợp for an intern.

conversation.speaker: 松本(まつもと)課長(かちょう)

question.jepang: インターン生(せい)にも実際(じっさい)のクライアントとのミーティングに同席(どうせき)していただくことがあります。守秘(しゅひ)義務(ぎむ)にかかわる情報(じょうほう)も扱(あつか)いますので、情報(じょうほう)管理(かんり)については十分(じゅうぶん)ご注意(ちゅうい)ください。
question.romaji: Intaansei ni mo jissai no kuraianto to no miitingu ni douseki shite itadaku koto ga arimasu. Shuhi gimu ni kakawaru jouhou mo atsukaimasu node, jouhou kanri ni tsuite wa juubun go-chuui kudasai.
question.arti: Interns also sometimes attend meetings with actual clients. Since you'll also handle information related to confidentiality obligations, please be careful with information management.

choices.jepang: 承知(しょうち)いたしました。機密(きみつ)情報(じょうほう)の取(と)り扱(あつか)いに関(かん)しては、社内(しゃない)規定(きてい)に基(もと)づいて厳重(げんじゅう)に管理(かんり)いたします。SNSへの投稿(とうこう)や社外(しゃがい)への情報(じょうほう)漏洩(ろうえい)がないよう、細心(さいしん)の注意(ちゅうい)を払(はら)います。
choices.romaji: Shouchi itashimashita. Kimitsu jouhou no toriatsukai ni kanshite wa, shanai kitei ni motozuite genjuu ni kanri itashimasu. SNS e no toukou ya shagai e no jouhou rouei ga nai you, saishin no chuui wo haraimasu.
choices.arti: Understood. Regarding handling confidential information, I will manage it strictly based on the company's internal regulations. I will be careful to avoid social media posts or information leaks outside the company.

choices.jepang: インターン生(せい)なので、そこまで厳(きび)しくしなくてもいいのではないですか。
choices.romaji: Intaansei na node, soko made kibishiku shinakute mo ii no de wa nai desu ka.
choices.arti: I'm just an intern, so it doesn't need to be that strict.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に基づいて để cho thấy commitment to managing information according to company rules. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai xem nhẹ confidentiality obligations that apply to everyone in the company.

conversation.speaker: 渡辺(わたなべ)人事部長(じんじぶちょう)

question.jepang: 報酬(ほうしゅう)についてご説明(せつめい)します。弊社(へいしゃ)のインターンシップは有給(ゆうきゅう)で、日給(にっきゅう)1万円(まんえん)をお支払(しはら)いいたします。交通費(こうつうひ)も実費(じっぴ)を支給(しきゅう)いたします。
question.romaji: Houshuu ni tsuite go-setsumei shimasu. Heisha no intaanshippu wa yuukyuu de, nikkyuu ichiman en wo oshiharai itashimasu. Koutsuuhi mo jippi wo shikyuu itashimasu.
question.arti: I'll explain about the compensation. Our internship is paid, with a daily salary of 10,000 yen. Transportation costs are also provided based on actual expenses.

choices.jepang: 1万円(まんえん)は安(やす)すぎます。もっと上(あ)げてもらえませんか。
choices.romaji: Ichiman en wa yasusugimasu. Motto agete moraemasen ka.
choices.arti: 10,000 yen is too cheap. Can it be raised?

choices.jepang: ご説明(せつめい)ありがとうございます。有給(ゆうきゅう)のインターンシップを設(もう)けていただいていることに感謝(かんしゃ)いたします。報酬(ほうしゅう)以上(いじょう)の学(まな)びを得(え)られるよう、精一杯(せいいっぱい)努力(どりょく)いたします。
choices.romaji: Go-setsumei arigatou gozaimasu. Yuukyuu no intaanshippu wo moukete itadaite iru koto ni kansha itashimasu. Houshuu ijou no manabi wo erareru you, seiippai doryoku itashimasu.
choices.arti: Thank you for the explanation. I'm grateful that a paid internship program is available. I will do my utmost to gain learning that exceeds the compensation.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng cho thấy a chuyên nghiệp attitude and gratitude for the paid internship opportunity. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is không phù hợp for an intern who is primarily there to learn.

conversation.speaker: 松本(まつもと)課長(かちょう)

question.jepang: インターンシップ期間中(きかんちゅう)は、週(しゅう)に一度(いちど)メンターとの面談(めんだん)がございます。業務(ぎょうむ)の進捗(しんちょく)に応(おう)じてフィードバックを行(おこな)い、成長(せいちょう)をサポートいたします。
question.romaji: Intaanshippu kikanchuu wa, shuu ni ichido mentaa to no mendan ga gozaimasu. Gyoumu no shinchoku ni oujite fiido bakku wo okonai, seichou wo sapooto itashimasu.
question.arti: During the internship period, there are weekly consultations with a mentor. According to work progress, we'll provide feedback and support your development.

choices.jepang: 面談(めんだん)は時間(じかん)の無駄(むだ)だと思(おも)うので、参加(さんか)しなくてもいいですか。
choices.romaji: Mendan wa jikan no muda da to omou node, sanka shinakute mo ii desu ka.
choices.arti: I think consultations are a waste of time. Can I skip them?

choices.jepang: メンター制度(せいど)があるのは大変(たいへん)心強(こころづよ)いです。フィードバックを真摯(しんし)に受(う)け止(と)め、改善(かいぜん)に繋(つな)げてまいりたいと思(おも)います。日々(ひび)の業務(ぎょうむ)を通(つう)じて、できるだけ多(おお)くのことを吸収(きゅうしゅう)したいです。
choices.romaji: Mentaa seido ga aru no wa taihen kokorozuyoi desu. Fiido bakku wo shinshi ni uketome, kaizen ni tsunagete mairitai to omoimasu. Hibi no gyoumu wo tsuujite, dekirudake ooku no koto wo kyuushuu shitai desu.
choices.arti: Having a mentor system is very reassuring. I want to take feedback seriously and connect it to improvement. Through daily work, I want to absorb as much as possible.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~を通じて để cho thấy commitment to learning through daily work and accepting guidance. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai rejects support that would actually be very beneficial.

conversation.speaker: 渡辺(わたなべ)人事部長(じんじぶちょう)

question.jepang: インターンシップ終了後(しゅうりょうご)、優秀(ゆうしゅう)な方(かた)には正社員(せいしゃいん)としての採用(さいよう)も検討(けんとう)しております。パフォーマンスに応(おう)じて、正式(せいしき)なオファーを出(だ)す場合(ばあい)もございます。
question.romaji: Intaanshippu shuuryou go, yuushuu na kata ni wa seishain to shite no saiyou mo kentou shite orimasu. Pafoomansu ni oujite, seishiki na ofaa wo dasu baai mo gozaimasu.
question.arti: After the internship ends, we also consider hiring outstanding performers as regular employees. According to performance, there are cases where we make formal offers.

choices.jepang: 正社員(せいしゃいん)の話(はなし)はまだ早(はや)いと思(おも)います。とりあえずインターンだけやります。
choices.romaji: Seishain no hanashi wa mada hayai to omoimasu. Toriaezu intaan dake yarimasu.
choices.arti: Talk of regular employment is premature. For now, let me just do the internship.

choices.jepang: 大変(たいへん)光栄(こうえい)なお話(はなし)です。インターンシップ期間(きかん)を通(つう)じて結果(けっか)を出(だ)し、御社(おんしゃ)に貢献(こうけん)できる人材(じんざい)であることを証明(しょうめい)したいと考(かんが)えております。全力(ぜんりょく)で取(と)り組(く)みます。
choices.romaji: Taihen kouei na ohanashi desu. Intaanshippu kikan wo tsuujite kekka wo dashi, onsha ni kouken dekiru jinzai de aru koto wo shoumei shitai to kangaete orimasu. Zenryoku de torikumimasu.
choices.arti: That's a very encouraging prospect. Through the internship period, I want to demonstrate results and prove that I'm a resource who can contribute to your company. I'll give it everything I have.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~を通じて để thể hiện determination to prove oneself during the internship period. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai cho thấy no ambition or appreciation for the career opportunity offered.

conversation.speaker: 渡辺(わたなべ)人事部長(じんじぶちょう)

question.jepang: それでは、面接(めんせつ)は以上(いじょう)となります。結果(けっか)は一週間(いっしゅうかん)以内(いない)にメールをもってお知(し)らせいたします。最後(さいご)に何(なに)かご質問(しつもん)はございますか。
question.romaji: Sore dewa, mensetsu wa ijou to narimasu. Kekka wa isshuukan inai ni meeru wo motte oshirase itashimasu. Saigo ni nanika go-shitsumon wa gozaimasu ka.
question.arti: Well then, the interview ends here. The results will be communicated by email within one week. Lastly, do you have any questions?

choices.jepang: 特(とく)にありません。早(はや)く結果(けっか)を教(おし)えてください。
choices.romaji: Toku ni arimasen. Hayaku kekka wo oshiete kudasai.
choices.arti: Nothing in particular. Please let me know the results quickly.

choices.jepang: 一点(いってん)伺(うかが)いたいのですが、インターンシップに先立(さきだ)ち、事前(じぜん)に読(よ)んでおくべき資料(しりょう)や、準備(じゅんび)しておくべきことがあれば教(おし)えていただけますか。本日(ほんじつ)は貴重(きちょう)なお時間(じかん)をいただき、誠(まこと)にありがとうございました。
choices.romaji: Itten ukagaitai no desu ga, intaanshippu ni sakidachi, jizen ni yonde oku beki shiryou ya, junbi shite oku beki koto ga areba oshiete itadakemasu ka. Honjitsu wa kichou na ojikan wo itadaki, makoto ni arigatou gozaimashita.
choices.arti: There's one thing I'd like to ask. Prior to the internship, if there are documents I should read or things I should prepare, could you let me know? Thank you very much for your valuable time today.

conversation.explanation: Câu trả lời đúng sử dụng ~に先立ち để hỏi about preparation before the internship starts and closes the interview politely. Trong khi đó, câu trả lời sai is thiếu lịch sự and cho thấy impatience không phù hợp for an interview.
